```{r model validation prevalence, eval=FALSE, echo=FALSE}
nbinom12sqrt <- glmmTMB(psite_prevalence ~ event*timing + ci + (1|catalog_number) + (1|year_collected/season) + (total_length_mm|fish_sp_x),
                                ziformula = ~ event*timing + ci + (1|catalog_number) + (1|year_collected/season) + (total_length_mm|fish_sp_x),
                                family = nbinom12(link = "sqrt"), data = hurricane_df_prevalence)


## offset

# nbinom1 log

nbinom1logoff <- glmmTMB(psite_prevalence ~ event*timing + ci + (1|catalog_number) + (1|year_collected/season) + 
                                  (1|fish_sp_x) + offset(log(total_length_mm)),
                                ziformula = ~ event*timing + ci + (1|catalog_number) + (1|year_collected/season) + (1|fish_sp_x) + 
                                  offset(sqrt(total_length_mm)), 
                                family = nbinom1, data = hurricane_df_prevalence)

# nbinom1 sqrt

nbinom1sqrtoff <- glmmTMB(psite_prevalence ~ event*timing + ci + (1|catalog_number) + (1|year_collected/season) + 
                                  (1|fish_sp_x) + offset(sqrt(total_length_mm)),
                                ziformula = ~ event*timing + ci + (1|catalog_number) + (1|year_collected/season) + (1|fish_sp_x) + 
                                  offset(sqrt(total_length_mm)), 
                                family = nbinom1(link = "sqrt"), data = hurricane_df_prevalence)

# nbinom2 log

nbinom2logoff <- glmmTMB(psite_prevalence ~ event*timing + ci + (1|catalog_number) + (1|year_collected/season) + 
                                  (1|fish_sp_x) + offset(log(total_length_mm)),
                                ziformula = ~ event*timing + ci + (1|catalog_number) + (1|year_collected/season) + (1|fish_sp_x) + 
                                  offset(sqrt(total_length_mm)), 
                                family = nbinom2, data = hurricane_df_prevalence)

# nbinom2 sqrt

nbinom2sqrtoff <- glmmTMB(psite_prevalence ~ event*timing + ci + (1|catalog_number) + (1|year_collected/season) + 
                                  (1|fish_sp_x) + offset(sqrt(total_length_mm)),
                                ziformula = ~ event*timing + ci + (1|catalog_number) + (1|year_collected/season) + (1|fish_sp_x) + 
                                  offset(sqrt(total_length_mm)), 
                                family = nbinom2(link = "sqrt"), data = hurricane_df_prevalence)

# nbinom12 log

nbinom12logoff <- glmmTMB(psite_prevalence ~ event*timing + ci + (1|catalog_number) + (1|year_collected/season) + 
                                  (1|fish_sp_x) + offset(log(total_length_mm)),
                                ziformula = ~ event*timing + ci + (1|catalog_number) + (1|year_collected/season) + (1|fish_sp_x) + 
                                  offset(sqrt(total_length_mm)), 
                                family = nbinom12, data = hurricane_df_prevalence)

#nbinom12 sqrt

nbinom12sqrtoff <- glmmTMB(psite_prevalence ~ event*timing + ci + (1|catalog_number) + (1|year_collected/season) + 
                                  (1|fish_sp_x) + offset(sqrt(total_length_mm)),
                                ziformula = ~ event*timing + ci + (1|catalog_number) + (1|year_collected/season) + (1|fish_sp_x) + 
                                  offset(sqrt(total_length_mm)), 
                                family = nbinom12(link = "sqrt"), data = hurricane_df_prevalence)



# List of all model objects
models <- list(
  nbinom1log, nbinom1sqrt, nbinom2log, nbinom2sqrt, nbinom12log, nbinom12sqrt,
  nbinom1logoff, nbinom1sqrtoff, nbinom2logoff, nbinom2sqrtoff,
  nbinom12logoff, nbinom12sqrtoff
)

# Model names
model_names <- c(
  "nbinom1log", "nbinom1sqrt", "nbinom2log", "nbinom2sqrt", "nbinom12log", "nbinom12sqrt",
  "nbinom1logoff", "nbinom1sqrtoff", "nbinom2logoff", "nbinom2sqrtoff",
  "nbinom12logoff", "nbinom12sqrtoff"
)

# Simulate residuals and extract diagnostics
residual_summaries <- map2_df(models, model_names, function(model, name) {
  sim <- simulateResiduals(fittedModel = model, plot = FALSE)
  data.frame(
    model = name,
    dispersion = testDispersion(sim)$p.value,
    uniformity = testUniformity(sim)$p.value,
    outliers = testOutliers(sim)$p.value,
    AIC = AIC(model)
  )
})

# View and sort by AIC (lower is better) and test stats (higher p-values indicate better fit)
residual_summaries %>%
  arrange(AIC) %>%
  print()
```

## Final Hurricane Prevalence Model
```{r}
# prevalence
hurricane_prevalence_final <- glmmTMB(psite_prevalence ~ event*timing + ci + (1|catalog_number) + (1|year_collected/season) + (1|fish_sp_x) + offset(log(total_length_mm)),
                                ziformula = ~ event*timing + ci + (1|catalog_number) + (1|year_collected/season) + (1|fish_sp_x) + offset(sqrt(total_length_mm)), 
                                family = nbinom2, data = hurricane_df_prevalence)

simulateResiduals(fittedModel = hurricane_prevalence_final, plot = TRUE)
summary(hurricane_prevalence_final)
plot(parameters(hurricane_prevalence_final))
```
# Life cycle 3 6 month
```{r}
# six month

hurricane_df6 <- hurricane_df6 %>% 
  filter(psite_count != "NA") %>%
  filter(life_history != "NA") 

# how many replicates are in each category --> this is just the number of occurrences, not abundance of parasites
ha.reps <- hurricane_df6 %>% 
  group_by(event, timing, life_history) %>% 
  summarize(observations = n(), .groups = "drop") %>%
  filter(life_history != "NA") 

# plot how many of each category we have
ggplot(ha.reps,
       aes(x = timing, y = observations, fill = life_history)) +
  facet_wrap(~ event) +
  geom_col(position = "dodge") +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("Complex" = "#6161d8", "Direct" = 	"#7cb47c")) + 
  labs(x = "Fish Species", y = "Number of Observations", fill = "Parasite Type", linetype = "Parasite Type") +
  connor_theme

# hurricane abundance with parasite type ---- this is not working and i am not sure why
ha.bins1 <- hurricane_df6 %>% 
  group_by(event, timing, life_history) %>% 
  summarize(avg.bin = mean(psite_count))

# use this as the raw plot of data
ggplot(ha.bins1,
       aes(x = timing, y = avg.bin, fill = life_history)) +
  facet_wrap( ~ event) +
  geom_col(position = "dodge") +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("Complex" = "#6161d8", "Direct" = 	"#7cb47c")) + 
  labs(x = "Timing", y = "Estimate", fill = "Parasite Type", linetype = "Parasite Type") +
  connor_theme

# hurricane abundance with fish species and parasite type
ha.bins2 <- hurricane_df6 %>% 
  group_by(event, timing, life_history, fish_sp_x) %>% 
  summarize(avg.bin = mean(psite_abundance))

# use this as the raw plot of data
ggplot(ha.bins2,
       aes(x = fish_sp_x, y = avg.bin, fill = life_history)) +
  facet_wrap(timing ~ event) +
  geom_col(position = "dodge") +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("Complex" = "#6161d8", "Direct" = 	"#7cb47c")) + 
  labs(x = "Fish Species", y = "Estimate", fill = "Parasite Type", linetype = "Parasite Type") +
  connor_theme


# check seasonality

# month and day against number of replicates
ha.season.lc <- hurricane_df6 %>% 
  group_by(event, timing, life_history, fish_sp_x, season, month_day, year_collected) %>% 
  summarize(observations = n(), .groups = "drop")

# insert a dummy year as an anchor
ha.season.lc <- ha.season.lc %>%
  mutate(month_day_date = as.Date(paste0("2025-", month_day), format = "%Y-%m-%d"))

ha.season.lc$month_day_date <- as.Date(format(as.Date(ha.season.lc$month_day_date), "2025-%m-%d"))

range(ha.season.lc$month_day_date)

ggplot(ha.season.lc,
       aes(x = month_day_date, y = event, fill = life_history)) +
  geom_violin(scale = "count", trim = FALSE) +
  geom_point(position = position_jitter(height = 0.2), shape = 21, size = 3, stroke = 0.2) +
  scale_x_date(
    limits = as.Date(c("2025-01-03", "2025-12-26")),
    date_labels = "%b",
    date_breaks = "1 month",
    expand = c(0.01, 0)
  ) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("Complex" = "#6161d8", "Direct" = 	"#7cb47c")) +
  labs(x = "Month", y = "Event", fill = "Life History") +
  connor_theme

# run a model to see if season has an effect on occurrences
season_model6.lc <- glmmTMB(observations ~ season*event, family = nbinom2, data = ha.season.lc)
simulateResiduals(fittedModel = season_model6.lc, plot = TRUE)
summary(season_model6.lc)
plot(parameters(season_model6.lc))

# no effect of seasonality present
```

### Model validation
```{r model validation abundance, echo=FALSE, eval=FALSE}
# no offset
# nbinom1 log

nbinom1log <- glmmTMB(psite_abundance ~ event*timing*life_history + ci + (1|catalog_number) + (1|year_collected/season) + 
                                  (1|fish_sp_x) + (total_length_mm|fish_psite_combo),
                                ziformula = ~ event*timing*life_history + ci + (1|catalog_number) + (1|year_collected/season) + (1|fish_sp_x) +
                                  (total_length_mm|fish_psite_combo), 
                                family = nbinom1, data = hurricane_df6)

# nbinom1 sqrt

nbinom1sqrt <- glmmTMB(psite_abundance ~ event*timing*life_history + ci + (1|catalog_number) + (1|year_collected/season) + 
                                  (1|fish_sp_x) + (total_length_mm|fish_psite_combo),
                                ziformula = ~ event*timing*life_history + ci + (1|catalog_number) + (1|year_collected/season) + (1|fish_sp_x) +
                                  (total_length_mm|fish_psite_combo), 
                                family = nbinom1(link = "sqrt"), data = hurricane_df6)

# nbinom2 log

nbinom2log <- glmmTMB(psite_abundance ~ event*timing*life_history + ci + (1|catalog_number) + (1|year_collected/season) + 
                                  (1|fish_sp_x) + (total_length_mm|fish_psite_combo),
                                ziformula = ~ event*timing*life_history + ci + (1|catalog_number) + (1|year_collected/season) + (1|fish_sp_x) +
                                  (total_length_mm|fish_psite_combo), 
                                family = nbinom2, data = hurricane_df6)

# nbinom2 sqrt

nbinom2sqrt <- glmmTMB(psite_abundance ~ event*timing*life_history + ci + (1|catalog_number) + (1|year_collected/season) + 
                                  (1|fish_sp_x) + (total_length_mm|fish_psite_combo),
                                ziformula = ~ event*timing*life_history + ci + (1|catalog_number) + (1|year_collected/season) + (1|fish_sp_x) +
                                  (total_length_mm|fish_psite_combo), 
                                family = nbinom2(link = "sqrt"), data = hurricane_df6)

# nbinom12 log

nbinom12log <- glmmTMB(psite_abundance ~ event*timing*life_history + ci + (1|catalog_number) + (1|year_collected/season) + 
                                  (1|fish_sp_x) + (total_length_mm|fish_psite_combo),
                                ziformula = ~ event*timing*life_history + ci + (1|catalog_number) + (1|year_collected/season) + (1|fish_sp_x) +
                                  (total_length_mm|fish_psite_combo), 
                                family = nbinom12, data = hurricane_df6)

#nbinom12 sqrt

nbinom12sqrt <- glmmTMB(psite_abundance ~ event*timing*life_history + ci + (1|catalog_number) + (1|year_collected/season) + 
                                  (1|fish_sp_x) + (total_length_mm|fish_psite_combo),
                                ziformula = ~ event*timing*life_history + ci + (1|catalog_number) + (1|year_collected/season) + (1|fish_sp_x) +
                                  (total_length_mm|fish_psite_combo), 
                                family = nbinom12(link = "sqrt"), data = hurricane_df6)
## offset

# nbinom1 log

nbinom1logoff <- glmmTMB(psite_abundance ~ event*timing*life_history + ci + (1|catalog_number) + (1|year_collected/season) + 
                                  (1|fish_sp_x) + offset(log(total_length_mm)),
                                ziformula = ~ event*timing*life_history + ci + (1|catalog_number) + (1|year_collected/season) + (1|fish_psite_combo) + (1|fish_sp_x) + 
                                  offset(sqrt(total_length_mm)), 
                                family = nbinom1, data = hurricane_df6)

# nbinom1 sqrt

nbinom1sqrtoff <- glmmTMB(psite_abundance ~ event*timing*life_history + ci + (1|catalog_number) + (1|year_collected/season) + 
                                  (1|fish_sp_x) + offset(sqrt(total_length_mm)),
                                ziformula = ~ event*timing*life_history + ci + (1|catalog_number) + (1|year_collected/season) + (1|fish_sp_x) + 
                                  offset(sqrt(total_length_mm)), 
                                family = nbinom1(link = "sqrt"), data = hurricane_df6)

# nbinom2 log

nbinom2logoff <- glmmTMB(psite_abundance ~ event*timing*life_history + ci + (1|catalog_number) + (1|year_collected/season) + 
                                  (1|fish_sp_x) + offset(log(total_length_mm)),
                                ziformula = ~ event*timing*life_history + ci + (1|catalog_number) + (1|year_collected/season) + (1|fish_sp_x) + 
                                  offset(sqrt(total_length_mm)), 
                                family = nbinom2, data = hurricane_df6)

# nbinom2 sqrt

nbinom2sqrtoff <- glmmTMB(psite_abundance ~ event*timing*life_history + ci + (1|catalog_number) + (1|year_collected/season) + 
                                  (1|fish_sp_x) + offset(sqrt(total_length_mm)),
                                ziformula = ~ event*timing*life_history + ci + (1|catalog_number) + (1|year_collected/season) + (1|fish_sp_x) + 
                                  offset(sqrt(total_length_mm)), 
                                family = nbinom2(link = "sqrt"), data = hurricane_df6)

# nbinom12 log

nbinom12logoff <- glmmTMB(psite_abundance ~ event*timing*life_history + ci + (1|catalog_number) + (1|year_collected/season) + 
                                  (1|fish_sp_x) + offset(log(total_length_mm)),
                                ziformula = ~ event*timing*life_history + ci + (1|catalog_number) + (1|year_collected/season) + (1|fish_sp_x) + 
                                  offset(sqrt(total_length_mm)), 
                                family = nbinom12, data = hurricane_df6)

#nbinom12 sqrt

nbinom12sqrtoff <- glmmTMB(psite_abundance ~ event*timing*life_history + ci + (1|catalog_number) + (1|year_collected/season) + 
                                  (1|fish_sp_x) + offset(sqrt(total_length_mm)),
                                ziformula = ~ event*timing*life_history + ci + (1|catalog_number) + (1|year_collected/season) + (1|fish_sp_x) + 
                                  offset(sqrt(total_length_mm)), 
                                family = nbinom12(link = "sqrt"), data = hurricane_df6)


# List of all model objects
models <- list(
  nbinom1log, nbinom1sqrt, nbinom2log, nbinom2sqrt, nbinom12log, nbinom12sqrt,
  nbinom1logoff, nbinom1sqrtoff, nbinom2logoff, nbinom2sqrtoff,
  nbinom12logoff, nbinom12sqrtoff
)

# Model names
model_names <- c(
  "nbinom1log", "nbinom1sqrt", "nbinom2log", "nbinom2sqrt", "nbinom12log", "nbinom12sqrt",
  "nbinom1logoff", "nbinom1sqrtoff", "nbinom2logoff", "nbinom2sqrtoff",
  "nbinom12logoff", "nbinom12sqrtoff"
)

# Simulate residuals and extract diagnostics
residual_summaries <- map2_df(models, model_names, function(model, name) {
  sim <- simulateResiduals(fittedModel = model, plot = FALSE)
  data.frame(
    model = name,
    dispersion = testDispersion(sim)$p.value,
    uniformity = testUniformity(sim)$p.value,
    outliers = testOutliers(sim)$p.value,
    AIC = AIC(model)
  )
})

# View and sort by AIC (lower is better) and test stats (higher p-values indicate better fit)
residual_summaries %>%
  arrange(AIC) %>%
  print()
```


## 6 month model life cycle
```{r}
# run model 
final_h_life6 <- glmmTMB(psite_abundance ~ event*timing*life_history + ci + (1|catalog_number) + (1|year_collected/season) + 
                                  (1|fish_sp_x) + (total_length_mm|fish_psite_combo),
                                ziformula = ~ event*timing*life_history + ci + (1|catalog_number) + (1|year_collected/season) + (1|fish_sp_x) +
                                  (total_length_mm|fish_psite_combo), 
                                family = nbinom2, data = hurricane_df6)

simulateResiduals(fittedModel = final_h_life6, plot = TRUE)
summary(final_h_life6)
plot(parameters(final_h_life6))

emm <- emmeans(final_h_life6, ~ event * timing * life_history)
joint_tests(final_h_life6)

emm <- emmeans(final_h_life6, ~ event * timing * life_history, type = "response")

emmip(final_h_life6, life_history ~ event | timing,
      type = "response",
      CIs = TRUE,
      dodge = 0.3) +
  theme_minimal() +
  labs(title = "Estimated Parasite Abundance by Event, Timing, and Parasite Type",
       y = "Estimated abundance (count scale)",
       x = "Event") +
  theme(legend.position = "bottom")

# Convert emmeans results to a data frame
emm_df <- as.data.frame(emm)

ggplot(emm_df, aes(x = event, y = response, color = life_history, group = life_history)) +
  geom_point(position = position_dodge(width = 0.3), size = 3) +
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin = asymp.LCL, ymax = asymp.UCL),
                position = position_dodge(width = 0.3), width = 0.2) +
  facet_wrap(~ timing) +
  theme_minimal() +
  labs(title = "Estimated Parasite Abundance by Event, Timing, and Parasite Type",
       y = "Estimated abundance (count scale)",
       x = "Event",
       color = "Parasite Type") +
  theme(legend.position = "bottom")

# no significant effects at 6 months
```



# Model the effects on specific parasite species within trem_meta
```{r, eval=FALSE}
# refine the data to only include the trem_metas:
meta6 <- hurricane_df_abundance_only_full %>% 
  filter(psite_type %in% c("trematode_metacercaria"))


meta6_reps <- meta6 %>% 
  group_by(psite_spp_x) %>% 
  summarize(observations = n(), .groups = "drop")

# remove unknown metas from the analysis and drop trem.meta.gg (less than 50 total observations)
meta6 <- meta6 %>% 
  filter(!psite_spp_x %in% c("TREM.META.GG", "TREM.META.UNK", "META.UNK"))

# set most abundant meta species to be the reference level
meta6  <- meta6 %>%
  mutate(psite_spp_x = relevel(factor(psite_spp_x), ref = "TREM.META"))

# create a model that looks at species of parasite only
meta6_model <- glmmTMB(psite_abundance ~ psite_spp_x + (1|catalog_number) + (1|year_collected) + (1|season) + (1|fish_psite_combo) + (1|fish_sp_x) + (total_length_mm|fish_psite_combo),
                                family = nbinom2, data = meta6)

simulateResiduals(fittedModel = meta6_model, plot = TRUE)
summary(meta6_model)
plot(parameters(meta6_model))

# TREM.META.SP is significnatly increasing -- meaning this is the only meta that is definitily positively affected by hurricanes 


```




# 3 Month Buffer
## Control assignment and resampling 3 month 
```{r control assignment to dataframe 3 mo, eval=FALSE, echo=TRUE}
# years in which there was no hurricane: 1963 1966 1967 1968 1970 1972 1973 1975 1976 1977 1978 1980 1981 1982 1983 1984 1986 1987 1989 1990 1991 1993 1994 1996 1999 2000 2005

set.seed(123) 
# List of no-hurricane years
no_event_years <- c(1963, 1966, 1967, 1968, 1970,
                    1972, 1973, 1975, 1976, 1977,
                    1978, 1980, 1981, 1982, 1983,
                    1984, 1986, 1987, 1989, 1990,
                    1991, 1993, 1994, 1996, 1999,
                    2000)

# initial order of random storm placement for controls was determined by tethering a random number to a storm name (this assignment order was used for both 6 month and 3 month buffer periods)

n_hurricanes <- 24

sampled_years <- sample(no_event_years, n_hurricanes, replace = TRUE)

assigned_controls <- data.frame(
  random_value = 1:n_hurricanes,
  control_year = sampled_years
)

# there are more control years than there are storms, so we sample randomly up to the # of hurricanes and apply NA to all remaining (unsampled) control years 


```
#### Control troubleshooting
Correct controls by identifying overlaps and reducing the period of control to not overlap with a hurricane event anymore
```{r, eval=FALSE, echo=FALSE}
# no resampling needed
```


# Hurricane events and Controls Mapping -- 3 month
Add actual hurricane timeline parameters for 3 month (3 month meaning a buffer period of 3 months before a hurricane [denoted as pre] and 3 months after a hurricane [denoted post]). These dates for hurricane occurrence are taken from the [NOAA hurricane watch website](https://coast.noaa.gov/hurricanes/#map=3.51/28.21/-61.45&) and represent all hurricane events that crossed a 50 mile boundary of the Pearl River from source to sea. 

```{r hurricane event and control assignment to df 3 mo}
# hurricane events
hurricane_df3 <- full_data %>%
  mutate(ewe_type = case_when(
    date >= as.Date("1969-05-14") & date <= as.Date("1969-08-14") ~ "pre_5",
    date >= as.Date("1969-08-14") & date <= as.Date("1969-08-22") ~ "hurricane_5", #camille
    date >= as.Date("1969-08-22") & date <= as.Date("1969-11-22") ~ "post_5",
    date >= as.Date("1971-06-05") & date <= as.Date("1971-09-05") ~ "pre_5",
    date >= as.Date("1971-09-05") & date <= as.Date("1971-09-15") ~ "hurricane_5", #edith
    date >= as.Date("1971-09-15") & date <= as.Date("1971-12-15") ~ "post_5",
    date >= as.Date("1992-05-16") & date <= as.Date("1992-08-16") ~ "pre_5",
    date >= as.Date("1992-08-16") & date <= as.Date("1992-08-19") ~ "hurricane_5", #andrew
    date >= as.Date("1992-08-19") & date <= as.Date("1992-11-19") ~ "post_5",
    date >= as.Date("2004-06-02") & date <= as.Date("2004-09-02") ~ "pre_5",
    date >= as.Date("2004-09-02") & date <= as.Date("2004-09-25") ~ "hurricane_5", #ivan -- external
    date >= as.Date("2004-09-25") & date <= as.Date("2004-12-25") ~ "post_5",
    date >= as.Date("1964-06-28") & date <= as.Date("1964-09-28") ~ "pre_4",
    date >= as.Date("1964-09-28") & date <= as.Date("1964-10-05") ~ "hurricane_4", #hilda
    date >= as.Date("1964-10-05") & date <= as.Date("1965-01-05") ~ "post_4",
    date >= as.Date("1965-05-27") & date <= as.Date("1965-08-27") ~ "pre_4",
    date >= as.Date("1965-08-27") & date <= as.Date("1965-09-13") ~ "hurricane_4", #betsy
    date >= as.Date("1965-09-13") & date <= as.Date("1965-12-13") ~ "post_4",
    date >= as.Date("1974-05-28") & date <= as.Date("1974-08-29") ~ "pre_4",
    date >= as.Date("1974-08-29") & date <= as.Date("1974-09-10") ~ "hurricane_4", #carmen -- external
    date >= as.Date("1974-09-10") & date <= as.Date("1974-12-10") ~ "post_4",
    date >= as.Date("1998-06-15") & date <= as.Date("1998-09-15") ~ "pre_4",
    date >= as.Date("1998-09-15") & date <= as.Date("1998-10-01") ~ "hurricane_4", #georges
    date >= as.Date("1998-10-01") & date <= as.Date("1999-01-01") ~ "post_4",
    date >= as.Date("2002-06-21") & date <= as.Date("2002-09-21") ~ "pre_4",
    date >= as.Date("2002-09-21") & date <= as.Date("2002-10-04") ~ "hurricane_4", #lili -- external 
    date >= as.Date("2002-10-04") & date <= as.Date("2003-01-04") ~ "post_4",
    date >= as.Date("1985-05-28") & date <= as.Date("1985-08-28") ~ "pre_3",
    date >= as.Date("1985-08-28") & date <= as.Date("1985-09-04") ~ "hurricane_3", #elena
    date >= as.Date("1985-09-04") & date <= as.Date("1985-12-04") ~ "post_3",
    date >= as.Date("2002-06-14") & date <= as.Date("2002-09-14") ~ "pre_3",
    date >= as.Date("2002-09-14") & date <= as.Date("2002-09-27") ~ "hurricane_3", #isidore 
    date >= as.Date("2002-09-27") & date <= as.Date("2002-12-27") ~ "post_3",
    date >= as.Date("1979-04-09") & date <= as.Date("1979-07-09") ~ "pre_1",
    date >= as.Date("1979-07-09") & date <= as.Date("1979-07-16") ~ "hurricane_1", #bob
    date >= as.Date("1979-07-16") & date <= as.Date("1979-10-16") ~ "post_1",
    date >= as.Date("1985-05-12") & date <= as.Date("1985-08-12") ~ "pre_1",
    date >= as.Date("1985-08-12") & date <= as.Date("1985-08-20") ~ "hurricane_1", #danny -- external
    date >= as.Date("1985-08-20") & date <= as.Date("1985-11-20") ~ "post_1",
    date >= as.Date("1985-07-26") & date <= as.Date("1985-10-26") ~ "pre_1",
    date >= as.Date("1985-10-26") & date <= as.Date("1985-11-03") ~ "hurricane_1", #juan
    date >= as.Date("1985-11-03") & date <= as.Date("1986-02-03") ~ "post_1",
    date >= as.Date("1988-06-07") & date <= as.Date("1988-09-07") ~ "pre_1",
    date >= as.Date("1988-09-07") & date <= as.Date("1988-09-11") ~ "hurricane_1", #florence
    date >= as.Date("1988-09-11") & date <= as.Date("1988-12-11") ~ "post_1",
    date >= as.Date("1997-04-16") & date <= as.Date("1997-07-16") ~ "pre_1",
    date >= as.Date("1997-07-16") & date <= as.Date("1997-07-27") ~ "hurricane_1", #danny
    date >= as.Date("1997-07-27") & date <= as.Date("1997-10-27") ~ "post_1",
    date >= as.Date("1988-05-07") & date <= as.Date("1988-08-07") ~ "pre_ts",
    date >= as.Date("1988-08-08") & date <= as.Date("1988-08-10") ~ "tropical_storm", #beryl
    date >= as.Date("1988-08-11") & date <= as.Date("1988-11-11") ~ "post_ts",
    date >= as.Date("1998-06-26") & date <= as.Date("1998-09-26") ~ "pre_ts",
    date >= as.Date("1998-09-27") & date <= as.Date("1998-09-30") ~ "tropical_storm", #hermine
    date >= as.Date("1998-10-01") & date <= as.Date("1999-01-01") ~ "post_ts",
    date >= as.Date("2001-03-05") & date <= as.Date("2001-06-05") ~ "pre_ts",
    date >= as.Date("2001-06-05") & date <= as.Date("2001-06-20") ~ "tropical_storm", #allison
    date >= as.Date("2001-06-20") & date <= as.Date("2001-09-20") ~ "post_ts",
    date >= as.Date("2002-05-04") & date <= as.Date("2002-08-04") ~ "pre_ts",
    date >= as.Date("2002-08-04") & date <= as.Date("2002-08-09") ~ "tropical_storm", #bertha
    date >= as.Date("2002-08-09") & date <= as.Date("2002-11-09") ~ "post_ts",
    date >= as.Date("2002-06-12") & date <= as.Date("2002-09-12") ~ "pre_ts",
    date >= as.Date("2002-09-12") & date <= as.Date("2002-09-15") ~ "tropical_storm", #hanna
    date >= as.Date("2002-09-15") & date <= as.Date("2002-12-15") ~ "post_ts",
    date >= as.Date("2003-03-27") & date <= as.Date("2003-06-27") ~ "pre_ts",
    date >= as.Date("2003-06-28") & date <= as.Date("2003-07-03") ~ "tropical_storm", #bill
    date >= as.Date("2003-07-04") & date <= as.Date("2003-10-04") ~ "post_ts",
    date >= as.Date("1965-06-23") & date <= as.Date("1965-09-23") ~ "pre_ts",
    date >= as.Date("1965-09-24") & date <= as.Date("1965-09-30") ~ "tropical_storm", #debbie
    date >= as.Date("1965-10-01") & date <= as.Date("1966-01-01") ~ "post_ts",
    date >= as.Date("1995-04-30") & date <= as.Date("1995-07-30") ~ "pre_double",
    date >= as.Date("1995-07-31") & date <= as.Date("1995-10-06") ~ "hurricane_double", #opal (4) and erin (2) combined
    date >= as.Date("1995-10-07") & date <= as.Date("1996-01-07") ~ "post_double",
    TRUE ~ "no event"
  ))

# controls with resampling of overlapped dates
hurricane_df3 <- hurricane_df3 %>%
  mutate(control = case_when(
    date >= as.Date("1983-06-28") & date <= as.Date("1983-09-28") ~ "pre_control",
    date >= as.Date("1983-09-28") & date <= as.Date("1983-10-05") ~ "control", #hilda
    date >= as.Date("1983-10-05") & date <= as.Date("1984-01-05") ~ "post_control",
    date >= as.Date("1989-05-27") & date <= as.Date("1989-08-27") ~ "pre_control",
    date >= as.Date("1989-08-27") & date <= as.Date("1989-09-13") ~ "control", #betsy
    date >= as.Date("1989-09-13") & date <= as.Date("1989-12-13") ~ "post_control",
    date >= as.Date("1982-04-09") & date <= as.Date("1982-07-09") ~ "pre_control",
    date >= as.Date("1982-07-09") & date <= as.Date("1982-07-16") ~ "control", #bob
    date >= as.Date("1982-07-16") & date <= as.Date("1982-10-16") ~ "post_control",
    date >= as.Date("1967-07-26") & date <= as.Date("1967-10-26") ~ "pre_control",
    date >= as.Date("1967-10-26") & date <= as.Date("1967-11-03") ~ "control", #juan
    date >= as.Date("1967-11-03") & date <= as.Date("1968-02-03") ~ "post_control",
    date >= as.Date("1977-06-07") & date <= as.Date("1977-09-07") ~ "pre_control",
    date >= as.Date("1977-09-07") & date <= as.Date("1977-09-11") ~ "control", #florence
    date >= as.Date("1977-09-11") & date <= as.Date("1977-12-11") ~ "post_control",
    date >= as.Date("1987-04-16") & date <= as.Date("1987-07-16") ~ "pre_control",
    date >= as.Date("1987-07-16") & date <= as.Date("1987-07-27") ~ "control", #danny
    date >= as.Date("1987-07-27") & date <= as.Date("1987-10-27") ~ "post_control",
    date >= as.Date("1993-06-12") & date <= as.Date("1993-09-12") ~ "pre_control",
    date >= as.Date("1993-09-12") & date <= as.Date("1993-09-15") ~ "control", #hanna
    date >= as.Date("1993-09-15") & date <= as.Date("1993-12-15") ~ "post_control",
    date >= as.Date("1978-03-27") & date <= as.Date("1978-06-27") ~ "pre_control",
    date >= as.Date("1978-06-28") & date <= as.Date("1978-07-03") ~ "control", #bill
    date >= as.Date("1978-07-04") & date <= as.Date("1978-10-04") ~ "post_control",
    date >= as.Date("1970-06-23") & date <= as.Date("1970-09-23") ~ "pre_control",
    date >= as.Date("1970-09-24") & date <= as.Date("1970-09-30") ~ "control", #debbie
    date >= as.Date("1970-10-01") & date <= as.Date("1971-01-01") ~ "post_control",
    date >= as.Date("1990-04-30") & date <= as.Date("1990-07-30") ~ "pre_control",
    date >= as.Date("1990-07-31") & date <= as.Date("1990-10-06") ~ "control", #opal (4) and erin (2) combined
    date >= as.Date("1990-10-07") & date <= as.Date("1991-01-07") ~ "post_control",
    date >= as.Date("1982-03-05") & date <= as.Date("1982-06-05") ~ "pre_control",
    date >= as.Date("1982-06-05") & date <= as.Date("1982-06-20") ~ "control", #allison
    date >= as.Date("1982-06-20") & date <= as.Date("1982-09-20") ~ "post_control",
    date >= as.Date("1993-05-28") & date <= as.Date("1993-08-28") ~ "pre_control",
    date >= as.Date("1993-08-28") & date <= as.Date("1993-09-04") ~ "control", #elena
    date >= as.Date("1993-09-04") & date <= as.Date("1993-12-04") ~ "post_control",
    date >= as.Date("1999-05-28") & date <= as.Date("1999-08-29") ~ "pre_control",
    date >= as.Date("1999-08-29") & date <= as.Date("1999-09-10") ~ "control", #carmen -- external
    date >= as.Date("1999-09-10") & date <= as.Date("1999-12-10") ~ "post_control",
    date >= as.Date("2000-06-14") & date <= as.Date("2000-09-14") ~ "pre_control",
    date >= as.Date("2000-09-14") & date <= as.Date("2000-09-27") ~ "control", #isidore 
    date >= as.Date("2000-09-27") & date <= as.Date("2000-12-27") ~ "post_control",
    date >= as.Date("1970-06-15") & date <= as.Date("1970-09-15") ~ "pre_control",
    date >= as.Date("1970-09-15") & date <= as.Date("1970-10-01") ~ "control", #georges
    date >= as.Date("1970-10-01") & date <= as.Date("1971-01-01") ~ "post_control",
    date >= as.Date("1989-05-07") & date <= as.Date("1989-08-07") ~ "pre_control",
    date >= as.Date("1989-08-08") & date <= as.Date("1989-08-10") ~ "control", #beryl
    date >= as.Date("1989-08-11") & date <= as.Date("1989-11-11") ~ "post_control",
    date >= as.Date("1999-05-04") & date <= as.Date("1999-08-04") ~ "pre_control",
    date >= as.Date("1999-08-04") & date <= as.Date("1999-08-09") ~ "control", #bertha
    date >= as.Date("1999-08-09") & date <= as.Date("1999-11-09") ~ "post_control",
    date >= as.Date("1999-05-14") & date <= as.Date("1999-08-14") ~ "pre_control",
    date >= as.Date("1999-08-14") & date <= as.Date("1999-08-22") ~ "control", #camille
    date >= as.Date("1999-08-22") & date <= as.Date("1999-11-22") ~ "post_control",
    date >= as.Date("1976-06-05") & date <= as.Date("1976-09-05") ~ "pre_control",
    date >= as.Date("1976-09-05") & date <= as.Date("1976-09-15") ~ "control", #edith
    date >= as.Date("1976-09-15") & date <= as.Date("1976-12-15") ~ "post_control",
    date >= as.Date("1967-05-16") & date <= as.Date("1967-08-16") ~ "pre_control",
    date >= as.Date("1967-08-16") & date <= as.Date("1967-08-19") ~ "control", #andrew
    date >= as.Date("1967-08-19") & date <= as.Date("1967-11-19") ~ "post_control",
    date >= as.Date("1975-06-26") & date <= as.Date("1975-09-26") ~ "pre_control",
    date >= as.Date("1975-09-27") & date <= as.Date("1975-09-30") ~ "control", #hermine
    date >= as.Date("1975-10-01") & date <= as.Date("1976-01-01") ~ "post_control",
    date >= as.Date("2000-05-12") & date <= as.Date("2000-08-12") ~ "pre_control",
    date >= as.Date("2000-08-12") & date <= as.Date("2000-08-20") ~ "control", #danny -- external
    date >= as.Date("2000-08-20") & date <= as.Date("2000-11-20") ~ "post_control",
    date >= as.Date("1973-06-21") & date <= as.Date("1973-09-21") ~ "pre_control",
    date >= as.Date("1973-09-21") & date <= as.Date("1973-10-04") ~ "control", #lili -- external 
    date >= as.Date("1973-10-04") & date <= as.Date("1974-01-04") ~ "post_control",
    date >= as.Date("1977-06-02") & date <= as.Date("1977-09-02") ~ "pre_control",
    date >= as.Date("1977-09-02") & date <= as.Date("1977-09-25") ~ "control", #ivan -- external
    date >= as.Date("1977-09-25") & date <= as.Date("1977-12-25") ~ "post_control",
    TRUE ~ "no event"
  ))

# make a new column for storm intensity

hurricane_df3 <- hurricane_df3 %>%
  mutate(storm_intensity = case_when(
    str_detect(ewe_type, "1") ~ "one",
    str_detect(ewe_type, "2") ~ "two",
    str_detect(ewe_type, "3") ~ "three",
    str_detect(ewe_type, "4") ~ "four",
    str_detect(ewe_type, "5") ~ "five",
    str_detect(ewe_type, "ts") ~ "ts",
    str_detect(ewe_type, "double") ~ "double",
    TRUE ~ "no event"
  ))

hurricane_df3 <- hurricane_df3 %>%
  mutate(event = case_when(
    ewe_type == "pre_5" ~ "hurricane",
    ewe_type == "post_5" ~ "hurricane",
    ewe_type == "pre_4" ~ "hurricane",
    ewe_type == "post_4" ~ "hurricane",
    ewe_type == "pre_3" ~ "hurricane",
    ewe_type == "post_3" ~ "hurricane",
    ewe_type == "pre_2" ~ "hurricane",
    ewe_type == "post_2" ~ "hurricane",
    ewe_type == "pre_1" ~ "hurricane",
    ewe_type == "post_1" ~ "hurricane",
    ewe_type == "pre_ts" ~ "hurricane",
    ewe_type == "post_ts" ~ "hurricane",
    ewe_type == "pre_double" ~ "hurricane",
    ewe_type == "post_double" ~ "hurricane",
    ewe_type == "no event" & control == "pre_control" ~ "control",
    ewe_type == "no event" & control == "post_control" ~ "control",
    TRUE ~ "NA"
  )) %>%
  filter(event != "NA")

hurricane_df3 <- hurricane_df3 %>%
  mutate(timing = case_when(
    ewe_type == "pre_5" ~ "pre",
    ewe_type == "post_5" ~ "post",
    ewe_type == "pre_4" ~ "pre",
    ewe_type == "post_4" ~ "post",
    ewe_type == "pre_3" ~ "pre",
    ewe_type == "post_3" ~ "post",
    ewe_type == "pre_2" ~ "pre",
    ewe_type == "post_2" ~ "post",
    ewe_type == "pre_1" ~ "pre",
    ewe_type == "post_1" ~ "post",
    ewe_type == "pre_ts" ~ "pre",
    ewe_type == "post_ts" ~ "post",
    ewe_type == "pre_double" ~ "pre",
    ewe_type == "post_double" ~ "post",
    control == "pre_control" ~ "pre",
    control == "post_control" ~ "post",
    ewe_type == "hurricane_4" ~ "during",
    TRUE ~ "NA"
  )) %>% 
  filter(timing != "NA")


hurricane_df3 <- hurricane_df3 %>%
  mutate(timing = factor(timing, levels = c("pre", "post"))) %>%
  mutate(timing = relevel(timing, ref = "pre")) %>% 
  mutate(event = factor(event, levels = c("hurricane", "control"))) %>%
  mutate(event = relevel(event, ref = "control")) 

# ===== filtering for abundance analysis ===== #
# drop low replicate categories
hurricane_df3_abundance <- hurricane_df3 %>%
  filter(psite_type %in% c("trematode", "trematode_metacercaria", "monogenean")) %>% 
  dplyr::mutate(psite_type = droplevels(psite_type))

# filter out all remaining NAs from the psite_abundance column --> there are some but shouldn't be 
hurricane_df3_abundance <- hurricane_df3_abundance %>%
  filter(!is.na(psite_abundance))

# ===== filtering for prevalence analysis ===== #
# drop low replicate categories
hurricane_df3_prevalence <- hurricane_df3 %>%
  filter(psite_type %in% c("myxozoan"))

# filter out all remaining NAs from the psite_prevalence column --> there are none
hurricane_df3_prevalence <- hurricane_df3_prevalence %>%
  filter(!is.na(psite_prevalence))


# what are total counts of each parasite type in each category?
summary <- hurricane_df3_abundance %>%
  group_by(event, timing, psite_type) %>%
  summarise(
    total_observations = n(),
    total_parasite_count = sum(psite_count, na.rm = TRUE),  # sum of parasite counts
    .groups = "drop"
  )

ggplot(summary,
       aes(x = event, y = total_observations, fill = psite_type)) +
  facet_wrap(~ timing) +
  geom_col(position = "dodge") +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("trematode_metacercaria" = "#AFDFEF", "monogenean" = "#A6E000", "trematode" = "#c9ad79", "myxozoan" = "#07c3c5")) + 
  labs(x = "Event", y = "Total Observations", fill = "Parasite Type") +
  connor_theme

summary <- hurricane_df3_prevalence %>%
  group_by(event, timing, psite_type) %>%
  summarise(
    total_observations = n(),
    total_parasite_count = sum(psite_count, na.rm = TRUE),  # sum of parasite counts
    .groups = "drop"
  )

ggplot(summary,
       aes(x = event, y = total_observations, fill = psite_type)) +
  facet_wrap(~ timing) +
  geom_col(position = "dodge") +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("trematode_metacercaria" = "#AFDFEF", "monogenean" = "#A6E000", "trematode" = "#c9ad79", "myxozoan" = "#07c3c5")) + 
  labs(x = "Event", y = "Total Observations", fill = "Parasite Type") +
  connor_theme

# number of control vs hurricane events by month
summary <- hurricane_df3_abundance %>%
  group_by(event, timing, psite_type, month_collected) %>%
  summarise(
    total_observations = n(),
    total_parasite_count = sum(psite_count, na.rm = TRUE),  # sum of parasite counts
    .groups = "drop"
  )
```


# Abundance
## Plot raw data (as averages not sums) to identify any trends in the data or inconsistencies.
```{r}
# how many replicates are in each category --> this is just the number of occurrences, not abundance of parasites
ha3.reps <- hurricane_df3_abundance %>% 
  group_by(event, timing, psite_type, fish_sp_x) %>% 
  summarize(observations = n(), .groups = "drop")

# plot how many of each category we have
ggplot(ha3.reps,
       aes(x = fish_sp_x, y = observations, fill = psite_type)) +
  facet_wrap(timing ~ event) +
  geom_col(position = "dodge") +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("trematode_metacercaria" = "#AFDFEF", "monogenean" = "#A6E000", "trematode" = "#c9ad79", "myxozoan" = "#07c3c5")) + 
  labs(x = "Fish Species", y = "Number of Observations", fill = "Parasite Type", linetype = "Parasite Type") +
  connor_theme

# hurricane abundance with parasite type
ha3.bins1 <- hurricane_df3_abundance %>% 
  group_by(event, timing, psite_type) %>% 
  summarize(avg.bin = mean(psite_abundance))

# use this as the raw plot of data
ggplot(ha3.bins1,
       aes(x = timing, y = avg.bin, fill = psite_type)) +
  facet_wrap( ~ event) +
  geom_col(position = "dodge") +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("trematode_metacercaria" = "#AFDFEF", "monogenean" = "#A6E000", "trematode" = "#c9ad79", "myxozoan" = "#07c3c5")) + 
  labs(x = "Timing", y = "Estimate", fill = "Parasite Type", linetype = "Parasite Type") +
  connor_theme

# hurricane abundance with fish species and parasite type
ha3.bins2 <- hurricane_df3_abundance %>% 
  group_by(event, timing, psite_type, fish_sp_x) %>% 
  summarize(avg.bin = mean(psite_abundance))

# use this as the raw plot of data
ggplot(ha3.bins2,
       aes(x = fish_sp_x, y = avg.bin, fill = psite_type)) +
  facet_wrap(timing ~ event) +
  geom_col(position = "dodge") +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("trematode_metacercaria" = "#AFDFEF", "monogenean" = "#A6E000", "trematode" = "#c9ad79", "myxozoan" = "#07c3c5")) + 
  labs(x = "Fish Species", y = "Estimate", fill = "Parasite Type", linetype = "Parasite Type") +
  connor_theme
```

## Drop carvel, pervig, ictpun, and gamaff from analysis since they do not have monos and metas consistently or they have super low replicate counts (<50 total parasites per category)
```{r}
hurricane_df3_abundance_only_full <- hurricane_df3_abundance %>% 
  filter(!fish_sp_x %in% c("pervig", "carvel"))

# plot new raw data 
# how many replicates are in each category--> this is just the number of occurrences, not abundance of parasites
ha3.reps <- hurricane_df3_abundance_only_full %>% 
  group_by(event, timing, psite_type, fish_sp_x) %>% 
  summarize(observations = n(), .groups = "drop")

# plot how many of each category we have
ggplot(ha3.reps,
       aes(x = fish_sp_x, y = observations, fill = psite_type)) +
  facet_wrap(timing ~ event) +
  geom_col(position = "dodge") +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("trematode_metacercaria" = "#AFDFEF", "monogenean" = "#A6E000", "trematode" = "#c9ad79", "myxozoan" = "#07c3c5")) + 
  labs(x = "Fish Species", y = "Number of Observations", fill = "Parasite Type", linetype = "Parasite Type") +
  connor_theme

# how many replicates are in each category without concern for parasite type
ha3.reps <- hurricane_df3_abundance_only_full %>% 
  group_by(event, timing, fish_sp_x) %>% 
  summarize(observations = n(), .groups = "drop")

# gamaff and and ictpun both have total replication counts (all parasite types combined) below 50 (and the model wont converge, which I think is due to these low replicate counts), so we should drop these two species from the model

hurricane_df3_abundance_only_full <- hurricane_df3_abundance %>% 
  filter(!fish_sp_x %in% c("pervig", "carvel", "ictpun", "gamaff"))

ha3.reps <- hurricane_df3_abundance_only_full %>% 
  group_by(event, timing, psite_type, fish_sp_x) %>% 
  summarize(observations = n(), .groups = "drop")

ggplot(ha3.reps,
       aes(x = fish_sp_x, y = observations, fill = psite_type)) +
  facet_wrap(timing ~ event) +
  geom_col(position = "dodge") +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("trematode_metacercaria" = "#AFDFEF", "monogenean" = "#A6E000", "trematode" = "#c9ad79", "myxozoan" = "#07c3c5")) + 
  labs(x = "Fish Species", y = "Number of Observations", fill = "Parasite Type", linetype = "Parasite Type") +
  connor_theme

# hurricane abundance with parasite type --> average abundances 
ha.bins1 <- hurricane_df3_abundance_only_full %>% 
  group_by(event, timing, psite_type) %>% 
  summarize(avg.bin = mean(psite_abundance))

# use this as the raw plot of data
ggplot(ha3.bins1,
       aes(x = timing, y = avg.bin, fill = psite_type)) +
  facet_wrap( ~ event) +
  geom_col(position = "dodge") +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("trematode_metacercaria" = "#AFDFEF", "monogenean" = "#A6E000", "trematode" = "#c9ad79", "myxozoan" = "#07c3c5")) + 
  labs(x = "Timing", y = "Average Parasite Abundance", fill = "Parasite Type", linetype = "Parasite Type") +
  connor_theme

# hurricane abundance with fish species and parasite type
ha3.bins2 <- hurricane_df3_abundance_only_full %>% 
  group_by(event, timing, psite_type, fish_sp_x) %>% 
  summarize(avg.bin = mean(psite_abundance))

# use this as the raw plot of data
ggplot(ha3.bins2,
       aes(x = fish_sp_x, y = avg.bin, fill = psite_type)) +
  facet_wrap(timing ~ event) +
  geom_col(position = "dodge") +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("trematode_metacercaria" = "#AFDFEF", "monogenean" = "#A6E000", "trematode" = "#c9ad79", "myxozoan" = "#07c3c5")) + 
  labs(x = "Fish Species", y = "Average Parasite Abundance", fill = "Parasite Type", linetype = "Parasite Type") +
  connor_theme
```
## Seasonality influencing distribution of abundance
```{r}
# month and day against number of replicates
ha3.season <- hurricane_df3_abundance_only_full %>% 
  group_by(event, timing, psite_type, fish_sp_x, season, month_day, year_collected) %>% 
  summarize(observations = n(), .groups = "drop")

# insert a dummy year as an anchor
ha3.season <- ha3.season %>%
  mutate(month_day_date = as.Date(paste0("2025-", month_day), format = "%Y-%m-%d"))

ha3.season$month_day_date <- as.Date(format(as.Date(ha3.season$month_day_date), "2025-%m-%d"))

range(ha3.season$month_day_date)

ggplot(ha3.season,
       aes(x = month_day_date, y = event, fill = psite_type)) +
  geom_violin(scale = "count", trim = FALSE) +
  geom_point(position = position_jitter(height = 0.2), shape = 21, size = 3, stroke = 0.2) +
  scale_x_date(
    limits = as.Date(c("2025-01-03", "2025-12-26")),
    date_labels = "%b",
    date_breaks = "1 month",
    expand = c(0.01, 0)
  ) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c(
    "trematode_metacercaria" = "#AFDFEF",
    "monogenean" = "#A6E000",
    "trematode" = "#c9ad79",
    "myxozoan" = "#07c3c5"
  )) +
  labs(x = "Month", y = "Event", fill = "Parasite Type") +
  connor_theme

# run a model to see if season has an effect on occurrences
season_model3 <- glmmTMB(observations ~ season*event, family = nbinom2, data = ha3.season)
simulateResiduals(fittedModel = season_model3, plot = TRUE)
summary(season_model3)
plot(parameters(season_model3))

# hurricanes have a negative effect, BUT there are no observations for hurricanes in winter, so we may need to drop that from the model

# why are there no winter occurances of parasites in hurricane?
season_only <- hurricane_df3 %>% 
  filter(season %in% c("winter")) %>% 
  filter(!fish_sp_x %in% c("pervig", "carvel", "ictpun", "gamaff")) 
# there are just no observations in winter for hurricane for these species
season_only <- hurricane_df3 %>% 
  filter(season %in% c("winter")) %>% 
  filter(event %in% c("hurricane"))
# all winter hurricane observations of fishes are in pervig, no hurricane observations in winter are present for any other species of fish -- perhaps there is some seasonality to the presence of fish in the river?

```


## Abundance Models
### Negative binomial glmmTMB model validation
```{r model validation abundance 3 mo, echo=FALSE, eval=FALSE}
# change season from a nested effect to a random effect, since the nesting is doing something funky as there are no observations in winter for hurricanes, so I think it is overparameterizing it 
# no offset
# nbinom1 log

nbinom1log <- glmmTMB(psite_abundance ~ event*timing*psite_type + ci + (1|catalog_number) + (1|year_collected) + (1|season) + 
                                  (1|fish_sp_x) + (total_length_mm|fish_psite_combo),
                                ziformula = ~ event*timing*psite_type + ci + (1|catalog_number) + (1|year_collected) + (1|season) + (1|fish_sp_x) +
                                  (total_length_mm|fish_psite_combo), 
                                family = nbinom1, data = hurricane_df3_abundance_only_full)

# nbinom1 sqrt

nbinom1sqrt <- glmmTMB(psite_abundance ~ event*timing*psite_type + ci + (1|catalog_number) + (1|year_collected) + (1|season) + 
                                  (1|fish_sp_x) + (total_length_mm|fish_psite_combo),
                                ziformula = ~ event*timing*psite_type + ci + (1|catalog_number) + (1|year_collected) + (1|season) + (1|fish_sp_x) +
                                  (total_length_mm|fish_psite_combo), 
                                family = nbinom1(link = "sqrt"), data = hurricane_df3_abundance_only_full)

# nbinom2 log

nbinom2log <- glmmTMB(psite_abundance ~ event*timing*psite_type + ci + (1|catalog_number) + (1|year_collected) + (1|season) + 
                                  (1|fish_sp_x) + (total_length_mm|fish_psite_combo),
                                ziformula = ~ event*timing*psite_type + ci + (1|catalog_number) + (1|year_collected)  + (1|season) + (1|fish_sp_x) +
                                  (total_length_mm|fish_psite_combo), 
                                family = nbinom2, data = hurricane_df3_abundance_only_full)

# nbinom2 sqrt

nbinom2sqrt <- glmmTMB(psite_abundance ~ event*timing*psite_type + ci + (1|catalog_number) + (1|year_collected) + (1|season) + 
                                  (1|fish_sp_x) + (total_length_mm|fish_psite_combo),
                                ziformula = ~ event*timing*psite_type + ci + (1|catalog_number) + (1|year_collected) + (1|season) + (1|fish_sp_x) +
                                  (total_length_mm|fish_psite_combo), 
                                family = nbinom2(link = "sqrt"), data = hurricane_df3_abundance_only_full)

# nbinom12 log

nbinom12log <- glmmTMB(psite_abundance ~ event*timing*psite_type + ci + (1|catalog_number) + (1|year_collected) + (1|season) + 
                                  (1|fish_sp_x) + (total_length_mm|fish_psite_combo),
                                ziformula = ~ event*timing*psite_type + ci + (1|catalog_number) + (1|year_collected) + (1|season) + (1|fish_sp_x) +
                                  (total_length_mm|fish_psite_combo), 
                                family = nbinom12, data = hurricane_df3_abundance_only_full)

#nbinom12 sqrt

nbinom12sqrt <- glmmTMB(psite_abundance ~ event*timing*psite_type + ci + (1|catalog_number) + (1|year_collected) + (1|season) + 
                                  (1|fish_sp_x) + (total_length_mm|fish_psite_combo),
                                ziformula = ~ event*timing*psite_type + ci + (1|catalog_number) + (1|year_collected) + (1|season) + (1|fish_sp_x) +
                                  (total_length_mm|fish_psite_combo), 
                                family = nbinom12(link = "sqrt"), data = hurricane_df3_abundance_only_full)
## offset

# nbinom1 log

nbinom1logoff <- glmmTMB(psite_abundance ~ event*timing*psite_type + ci + (1|catalog_number) + (1|year_collected) + (1|season) + 
                                  (1|fish_sp_x) + offset(log(total_length_mm)),
                                ziformula = ~ event*timing*psite_type + ci + (1|catalog_number) + (1|year_collected) + (1|season) + (1|fish_sp_x) + 
                                  offset(sqrt(total_length_mm)), 
                                family = nbinom1, data = hurricane_df3_abundance_only_full)

# nbinom1 sqrt

nbinom1sqrtoff <- glmmTMB(psite_abundance ~ event*timing*psite_type + ci + (1|catalog_number) + (1|year_collected) + (1|season) + 
                                  (1|fish_sp_x) + offset(sqrt(total_length_mm)),
                                ziformula = ~ event*timing*psite_type + ci + (1|catalog_number) + (1|year_collected) + (1|season) + (1|fish_sp_x) + 
                                  offset(sqrt(total_length_mm)), 
                                family = nbinom1(link = "sqrt"), data = hurricane_df3_abundance_only_full)

# nbinom2 log

nbinom2logoff <- glmmTMB(psite_abundance ~ event*timing*psite_type + ci + (1|catalog_number) + (1|year_collected) + (1|season) + 
                                  (1|fish_sp_x) + offset(log(total_length_mm)),
                                ziformula = ~ event*timing*psite_type + ci + (1|catalog_number) + (1|year_collected) + (1|season) + (1|fish_sp_x) + 
                                  offset(sqrt(total_length_mm)), 
                                family = nbinom2, data = hurricane_df3_abundance_only_full)

# nbinom2 sqrt

nbinom2sqrtoff <- glmmTMB(psite_abundance ~ event*timing*psite_type + ci + (1|catalog_number) + (1|year_collected) + (1|season) + 
                                  (1|fish_sp_x) + offset(sqrt(total_length_mm)),
                                ziformula = ~ event*timing*psite_type + ci + (1|catalog_number) + (1|year_collected) + (1|season) + (1|fish_sp_x) + 
                                  offset(sqrt(total_length_mm)), 
                                family = nbinom2(link = "sqrt"), data = hurricane_df3_abundance_only_full)

# nbinom12 log

nbinom12logoff <- glmmTMB(psite_abundance ~ event*timing*psite_type + ci + (1|catalog_number) + (1|year_collected) + (1|season) + 
                                  (1|fish_sp_x) + offset(log(total_length_mm)),
                                ziformula = ~ event*timing*psite_type + ci + (1|catalog_number) + (1|year_collected) + (1|season) + (1|fish_sp_x) + 
                                  offset(sqrt(total_length_mm)), 
                                family = nbinom12, data = hurricane_df3_abundance_only_full)

#nbinom12 sqrt

nbinom12sqrtoff <- glmmTMB(psite_abundance ~ event*timing*psite_type + ci + (1|catalog_number) + (1|year_collected) + (1|season) + 
                                  (1|fish_sp_x) + offset(sqrt(total_length_mm)),
                                ziformula = ~ event*timing*psite_type + ci + (1|catalog_number) + (1|year_collected) + (1|season) + (1|fish_sp_x) + 
                                  offset(sqrt(total_length_mm)), 
                                family = nbinom12(link = "sqrt"), data = hurricane_df3_abundance_only_full)


# List of all model objects
models <- list(
  nbinom1log, nbinom1sqrt, nbinom2log, nbinom2sqrt, nbinom12log, nbinom12sqrt,
  nbinom1logoff, nbinom1sqrtoff, nbinom2logoff, nbinom2sqrtoff,
  nbinom12logoff, nbinom12sqrtoff
)

# Model names
model_names <- c(
  "nbinom1log", "nbinom1sqrt", "nbinom2log", "nbinom2sqrt", "nbinom12log", "nbinom12sqrt",
  "nbinom1logoff", "nbinom1sqrtoff", "nbinom2logoff", "nbinom2sqrtoff",
  "nbinom12logoff", "nbinom12sqrtoff"
)

# Simulate residuals and extract diagnostics
residual_summaries <- map2_df(models, model_names, function(model, name) {
  sim <- simulateResiduals(fittedModel = model, plot = FALSE)
  data.frame(
    model = name,
    dispersion = testDispersion(sim)$p.value,
    uniformity = testUniformity(sim)$p.value,
    outliers = testOutliers(sim)$p.value,
    AIC = AIC(model)
  )
})

# View and sort by AIC (lower is better) and test stats (higher p-values indicate better fit)
residual_summaries %>%
  arrange(AIC) %>%
  print()



```

## Final Hurricane Abundance Model
```{r}
# run model 
final_h_abundance3 <- glmmTMB(psite_abundance ~ event*timing*psite_type + ci + (1|catalog_number) + (1|year_collected) + (1|season) + (1|fish_sp_x) + (total_length_mm|fish_psite_combo),
                                ziformula = ~ event*timing*psite_type + ci + (1|catalog_number) + (1|year_collected)  + (1|season) + (1|fish_sp_x) + (total_length_mm|fish_psite_combo), 
                                family = nbinom2, data = hurricane_df3_abundance_only_full)

simulateResiduals(fittedModel = final_h_abundance3, plot = TRUE)
summary(final_h_abundance3)
plot(parameters(final_h_abundance3))

emm <- emmeans(final_h_abundance3, ~ event * timing * psite_type)
joint_tests(final_h_abundance3)


#The overall test says the interaction between timing and parasite type is strongly significant.

#Also, the 3-way interaction including event is significant.

#The individual main effects and other 2-way interactions are not significant at the conventional 0.05 level.

#This implies the effect of event on abundance depends on the combination of timing and parasite type.

#It also highlights the importance of looking beyond main effects to understand your model.

emm <- emmeans(final_h_abundance3, ~ event * timing * psite_type, type = "response")

emmip(final_h_abundance3, psite_type ~ event | timing,
      type = "response",
      CIs = TRUE,
      dodge = 0.3) +
  theme_minimal() +
  labs(title = "Estimated Parasite Abundance by Event, Timing, and Parasite Type",
       y = "Estimated abundance (count scale)",
       x = "Event") +
  theme(legend.position = "bottom")

# Convert emmeans results to a data frame
emm_df <- as.data.frame(emm)

ggplot(emm_df, aes(x = event, y = response, color = psite_type, group = psite_type)) +
  geom_point(position = position_dodge(width = 0.3), size = 3) +
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin = asymp.LCL, ymax = asymp.UCL),
                position = position_dodge(width = 0.3), width = 0.2) +
  facet_wrap(~ timing) +
  theme_minimal() +
  labs(title = "Estimated Parasite Abundance by Event, Timing, and Parasite Type",
       y = "Estimated abundance (count scale)",
       x = "Event",
       color = "Parasite Type") +
  theme(legend.position = "bottom")



# relevel to see mono relationship:
hurricane_df3_abundance_only_full_mono <- hurricane_df3_abundance_only_full %>% 
  mutate(psite_type = factor(psite_type, levels = c("trematode_metacercaria", "trematode", "monogenean")))


final_h_abundance3mono <- glmmTMB(psite_abundance ~ event*timing*psite_type + ci + (1|catalog_number) + (1|year_collected) + (1|season) + (1|fish_sp_x) + (total_length_mm|fish_psite_combo),
                                ziformula = ~ event*timing*psite_type + ci + (1|catalog_number) + (1|year_collected)  + (1|season) + (1|fish_sp_x) + (total_length_mm|fish_psite_combo), 
                                family = nbinom2, data = hurricane_df3_abundance_only_full_mono)

simulateResiduals(fittedModel = final_h_abundance3mono, plot = TRUE)
summary(final_h_abundance3mono)
plot(parameters(final_h_abundance3mono))

emm <- emmeans(final_h_abundance3mono, ~ event * timing * psite_type)
joint_tests(final_h_abundance3mono)
```


# Prevalence 
Plot raw data (as averages not sums) to identify any trends in the data or inconsistencies.
```{r}
# how many replicates are in each category --> this is just the number of occurrences, not abundance of parasites
hp3.reps <- hurricane_df3_prevalence %>% 
  group_by(event, timing, psite_type, fish_sp_x) %>% 
  summarize(observations = n(), .groups = "drop")

# plot how many of each category we have
raw1p <- ggplot(hp3.reps,
       aes(x = fish_sp_x, y = observations, fill = psite_type)) +
  facet_wrap(timing ~ event) +
  geom_col(position = "dodge") +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("trematode_metacercaria" = "#AFDFEF", "monogenean" = "#A6E000", "trematode" = "#c9ad79", "myxozoan" = "#07c3c5")) + 
  labs(x = "Fish Species", y = "Number of Observations", fill = "Parasite Type", linetype = "Parasite Type") +
  connor_theme

# hurricane abundance with parasite type
hp3.bins1 <- hurricane_df3_prevalence %>% 
  group_by(event, timing, psite_type) %>% 
  summarize(avg.bin = mean(psite_prevalence))

# use this as the raw plot of data
raw2p <- ggplot(hp3.bins1,
       aes(x = timing, y = avg.bin, fill = psite_type)) +
  facet_wrap( ~ event) +
  geom_col(position = "dodge") +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("trematode_metacercaria" = "#AFDFEF", "monogenean" = "#A6E000", "trematode" = "#c9ad79", "myxozoan" = "#07c3c5")) + 
  labs(x = "Timing", y = "Estimate", fill = "Parasite Type", linetype = "Parasite Type") +
  connor_theme

# hurricane abundance with fish species and parasite type
hp3.bins2 <- hurricane_df3_prevalence %>% 
  group_by(event, timing, psite_type, fish_sp_x) %>% 
  summarize(avg.bin = mean(psite_prevalence))

# use this as the raw plot of data
raw3p <- ggplot(hp3.bins2,
       aes(x = fish_sp_x, y = avg.bin, fill = psite_type)) +
  facet_wrap(timing ~ event) +
  geom_col(position = "dodge") +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("trematode_metacercaria" = "#AFDFEF", "monogenean" = "#A6E000", "trematode" = "#c9ad79", "myxozoan" = "#07c3c5")) + 
  labs(x = "Fish Species", y = "Estimate", fill = "Parasite Type", linetype = "Parasite Type") +
  connor_theme

hurricane_prevalence3_raw <- ggarrange(raw1p, raw2p, raw3p, common.legend = FALSE, legend = "bottom", labels = c("A", "B", "C"))
plot(hurricane_prevalence3_raw)

# no myxos in percina -- is already not in the database
```

## Seasonality influencing distribution - prevalence
```{r}
# month and day against number of replicates
hp3.season <- hurricane_df3_prevalence %>% 
  group_by(event, timing, psite_type, fish_sp_x, season, month_day) %>% 
  summarize(observations = n(), .groups = "drop")

# insert a dummy year as an anchor
hp3.season <- hp3.season %>%
  mutate(month_day_date = as.Date(paste0("2020-", month_day), format = "%Y-%m-%d"))

ggplot(hp3.season,
       aes(x = month_day_date, y = event, fill = psite_type)) +
  geom_violin() +
  geom_point(position = position_jitter(height = 0.2), shape = 21, size = 3, stroke = 0.2) +
  scale_x_date(date_labels = "%b %d", date_breaks = "1 month") +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c(
    "trematode_metacercaria" = "#AFDFEF",
    "monogenean" = "#A6E000",
    "trematode" = "#c9ad79",
    "myxozoan" = "#07c3c5"
  )) +
  labs(x = "Month-Day", y = "Event", fill = "Parasite Type") +
  connor_theme


# run a model to see if season has an effect on occurrences
season_model3p <- glmmTMB(observations ~ season*event, family = nbinom2, data = hp3.season)
simulateResiduals(fittedModel = season_model3p, plot = TRUE)
summary(season_model3p)
plot(parameters(season_model3p))

# summer and hurricanes have some sort of significant influence on myxo prevalence -- there are not enough observations in winter to make comments about
```


## Prevalence Models
```{r model validation prevalence 3 mo, eval=FALSE, echo=FALSE}
# no offset
# nbinom1 log

nbinom1log <- glmmTMB(psite_prevalence ~ event*timing + ci + (1|catalog_number) + (1|year_collected/season) + 
                                  (total_length_mm|fish_sp_x),
                                ziformula = ~ event*timing + ci + (1|catalog_number) + (1|year_collected/season) + (total_length_mm|fish_sp_x), 
                                family = nbinom1, data = hurricane_df3_prevalence)
# nbinom1 sqrt

nbinom1sqrt <- glmmTMB(psite_prevalence ~ event*timing + ci + (1|catalog_number) + (1|year_collected/season) + (total_length_mm|fish_sp_x),
                                ziformula = ~ event*timing + ci + (1|catalog_number) + (1|year_collected/season) + (total_length_mm|fish_sp_x),
                                family = nbinom1(link = "sqrt"), data = hurricane_df3_prevalence)

# nbinom2 log

nbinom2log <- glmmTMB(psite_prevalence ~ event*timing + ci + (1|catalog_number) + (1|year_collected/season) + (total_length_mm|fish_sp_x),
                                ziformula = ~ event*timing + ci + (1|catalog_number) + (1|year_collected/season) + (total_length_mm|fish_sp_x),
                                family = nbinom2, data = hurricane_df3_prevalence)

# nbinom2 sqrt

nbinom2sqrt <- glmmTMB(psite_prevalence ~ event*timing + ci + (1|catalog_number) + (1|year_collected/season) + (total_length_mm|fish_sp_x),
                                ziformula = ~ event*timing + ci + (1|catalog_number) + (1|year_collected/season) + (total_length_mm|fish_sp_x),
                                family = nbinom2(link = "sqrt"), data = hurricane_df3_prevalence)

# nbinom12 log

nbinom12log <- glmmTMB(psite_prevalence ~ event*timing + ci + (1|catalog_number) + (1|year_collected/season) + (total_length_mm|fish_sp_x),
                                ziformula = ~ event*timing + ci + (1|catalog_number) + (1|year_collected/season) + (total_length_mm|fish_sp_x),
                                family = nbinom12, data = hurricane_df3_prevalence)

#nbinom12 sqrt

nbinom12sqrt <- glmmTMB(psite_prevalence ~ event*timing + ci + (1|catalog_number) + (1|year_collected/season) + (total_length_mm|fish_sp_x),
                                ziformula = ~ event*timing + ci + (1|catalog_number) + (1|year_collected/season) + (total_length_mm|fish_sp_x),
                                family = nbinom12(link = "sqrt"), data = hurricane_df3_prevalence)


## offset

# nbinom1 log

nbinom1logoff <- glmmTMB(psite_prevalence ~ event*timing + ci + (1|catalog_number) + (1|year_collected/season) + 
                                  (1|fish_sp_x) + offset(log(total_length_mm)),
                                ziformula = ~ event*timing + ci + (1|catalog_number) + (1|year_collected/season) + (1|fish_sp_x) + 
                                  offset(sqrt(total_length_mm)), 
                                family = nbinom1, data = hurricane_df3_prevalence)

# nbinom1 sqrt

nbinom1sqrtoff <- glmmTMB(psite_prevalence ~ event*timing + ci + (1|catalog_number) + (1|year_collected/season) + 
                                  (1|fish_sp_x) + offset(sqrt(total_length_mm)),
                                ziformula = ~ event*timing + ci + (1|catalog_number) + (1|year_collected/season) + (1|fish_sp_x) + 
                                  offset(sqrt(total_length_mm)), 
                                family = nbinom1(link = "sqrt"), data = hurricane_df3_prevalence)

# nbinom2 log

nbinom2logoff <- glmmTMB(psite_prevalence ~ event*timing + ci + (1|catalog_number) + (1|year_collected/season) + 
                                  (1|fish_sp_x) + offset(log(total_length_mm)),
                                ziformula = ~ event*timing + ci + (1|catalog_number) + (1|year_collected/season) + (1|fish_sp_x) + 
                                  offset(sqrt(total_length_mm)), 
                                family = nbinom2, data = hurricane_df3_prevalence)

# nbinom2 sqrt

nbinom2sqrtoff <- glmmTMB(psite_prevalence ~ event*timing + ci + (1|catalog_number) + (1|year_collected/season) + 
                                  (1|fish_sp_x) + offset(sqrt(total_length_mm)),
                                ziformula = ~ event*timing + ci + (1|catalog_number) + (1|year_collected/season) + (1|fish_sp_x) + 
                                  offset(sqrt(total_length_mm)), 
                                family = nbinom2(link = "sqrt"), data = hurricane_df3_prevalence)

# nbinom12 log

nbinom12logoff <- glmmTMB(psite_prevalence ~ event*timing + ci + (1|catalog_number) + (1|year_collected/season) + 
                                  (1|fish_sp_x) + offset(log(total_length_mm)),
                                ziformula = ~ event*timing + ci + (1|catalog_number) + (1|year_collected/season) + (1|fish_sp_x) + 
                                  offset(sqrt(total_length_mm)), 
                                family = nbinom12, data = hurricane_df3_prevalence)

#nbinom12 sqrt

nbinom12sqrtoff <- glmmTMB(psite_prevalence ~ event*timing + ci + (1|catalog_number) + (1|year_collected/season) + 
                                  (1|fish_sp_x) + offset(sqrt(total_length_mm)),
                                ziformula = ~ event*timing + ci + (1|catalog_number) + (1|year_collected/season) + (1|fish_sp_x) + 
                                  offset(sqrt(total_length_mm)), 
                                family = nbinom12(link = "sqrt"), data = hurricane_df3_prevalence)



# List of all model objects
models <- list(
  nbinom1log, nbinom1sqrt, nbinom2log, nbinom2sqrt, nbinom12log, nbinom12sqrt,
  nbinom1logoff, nbinom1sqrtoff, nbinom2logoff, nbinom2sqrtoff,
  nbinom12logoff, nbinom12sqrtoff
)

# Model names
model_names <- c(
  "nbinom1log", "nbinom1sqrt", "nbinom2log", "nbinom2sqrt", "nbinom12log", "nbinom12sqrt",
  "nbinom1logoff", "nbinom1sqrtoff", "nbinom2logoff", "nbinom2sqrtoff",
  "nbinom12logoff", "nbinom12sqrtoff"
)

# Simulate residuals and extract diagnostics
residual_summaries <- map2_df(models, model_names, function(model, name) {
  sim <- simulateResiduals(fittedModel = model, plot = FALSE)
  data.frame(
    model = name,
    dispersion = testDispersion(sim)$p.value,
    uniformity = testUniformity(sim)$p.value,
    outliers = testOutliers(sim)$p.value,
    AIC = AIC(model)
  )
})

# View and sort by AIC (lower is better) and test stats (higher p-values indicate better fit)
residual_summaries %>%
  arrange(AIC) %>%
  print()


# all these models are now returning NA after fixing the controls -- why?

```

## Final Hurricane Prevalence Model
```{r}
# prevalence
hurricane_prevalence3_final <- glmmTMB(psite_prevalence ~ event*timing + ci + (1|catalog_number) + (1|year_collected/season) + (1|fish_sp_x) + offset(log(total_length_mm)),
                                ziformula = ~ event*timing + ci + (1|catalog_number) + (1|year_collected/season) + (1|fish_sp_x) + offset(sqrt(total_length_mm)), 
                                family = nbinom2, data = hurricane_df3_prevalence)

simulateResiduals(fittedModel = hurricane_prevalence3_final, plot = TRUE)
summary(hurricane_prevalence3_final)
plot(parameters(hurricane_prevalence3_final))

# switch things around so that monogenes are not reference category? how do i get stats on the reference level?
```
# Life cycle 3 month
```{r}
# three month

hurricane_df3 <- hurricane_df3 %>% 
  filter(psite_count != "NA") %>%
  filter(life_history != "NA") 

# how many replicates are in each category --> this is just the number of occurrences, not abundance of parasites
ha.reps <- hurricane_df3 %>% 
  group_by(event, timing, life_history) %>% 
  summarize(observations = n(), .groups = "drop") %>%
  filter(life_history != "NA") 

# plot how many of each category we have
ggplot(ha.reps,
       aes(x = timing, y = observations, fill = life_history)) +
  facet_wrap(~ event) +
  geom_col(position = "dodge") +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("Complex" = "#6161d8", "Direct" = 	"#7cb47c")) + 
  labs(x = "Fish Species", y = "Number of Observations", fill = "Parasite Type", linetype = "Parasite Type") +
  connor_theme

# hurricane abundance with parasite type ---- this is not working and i am not sure why
ha.bins1 <- hurricane_df3 %>% 
  group_by(event, timing, life_history) %>% 
  summarize(avg.bin = mean(psite_count))

# use this as the raw plot of data
ggplot(ha.bins1,
       aes(x = timing, y = avg.bin, fill = life_history)) +
  facet_wrap( ~ event) +
  geom_col(position = "dodge") +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("Complex" = "#6161d8", "Direct" = 	"#7cb47c")) + 
  labs(x = "Timing", y = "Estimate", fill = "Parasite Type", linetype = "Parasite Type") +
  connor_theme

# hurricane abundance with fish species and parasite type
ha.bins2 <- hurricane_df3 %>% 
  group_by(event, timing, life_history, fish_sp_x) %>% 
  summarize(avg.bin = mean(psite_abundance))

# use this as the raw plot of data
ggplot(ha.bins2,
       aes(x = fish_sp_x, y = avg.bin, fill = life_history)) +
  facet_wrap(timing ~ event) +
  geom_col(position = "dodge") +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("Complex" = "#6161d8", "Direct" = 	"#7cb47c")) + 
  labs(x = "Fish Species", y = "Estimate", fill = "Parasite Type", linetype = "Parasite Type") +
  connor_theme


# check seasonality

# month and day against number of replicates
ha.season.lc3 <- hurricane_df3 %>% 
  group_by(event, timing, life_history, fish_sp_x, season, month_day, year_collected) %>% 
  summarize(observations = n(), .groups = "drop")

# insert a dummy year as an anchor
ha.season.lc3 <- ha.season.lc3 %>%
  mutate(month_day_date = as.Date(paste0("2025-", month_day), format = "%Y-%m-%d"))

ha.season.lc3$month_day_date <- as.Date(format(as.Date(ha.season.lc3$month_day_date), "2025-%m-%d"))

range(ha.season.lc3$month_day_date)

ggplot(ha.season.lc3,
       aes(x = month_day_date, y = event, fill = life_history)) +
  geom_violin(scale = "count", trim = FALSE) +
  geom_point(position = position_jitter(height = 0.2), shape = 21, size = 3, stroke = 0.2) +
  scale_x_date(
    limits = as.Date(c("2025-01-03", "2025-12-26")),
    date_labels = "%b",
    date_breaks = "1 month",
    expand = c(0.01, 0)
  ) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("Complex" = "#6161d8", "Direct" = 	"#7cb47c")) +
  labs(x = "Month", y = "Event", fill = "Life History") +
  connor_theme

# run a model to see if season has an effect on occurrences
season_model3.lc <- glmmTMB(observations ~ season*event, family = nbinom2, data = ha.season.lc3)
simulateResiduals(fittedModel = season_model3.lc, plot = TRUE)
summary(season_model3.lc)
plot(parameters(season_model3.lc))

# no effect of seasonality present
```

### Model validation
```{r model validation abundance, echo=FALSE, eval=FALSE}
# no offset
# nbinom1 log

nbinom1log <- glmmTMB(psite_abundance ~ event*timing*life_history + ci + (1|catalog_number) + (1|year_collected/season) + (1|fish_psite_combo) + 
                                  (1|fish_sp_x) + (total_length_mm|fish_psite_combo),
                                ziformula = ~ event*timing*life_history + ci + (1|catalog_number) + (1|year_collected/season) + (1|fish_psite_combo) + (1|fish_sp_x) +
                                  (total_length_mm|fish_psite_combo), 
                                family = nbinom1, data = hurricane_df3)

# nbinom1 sqrt

nbinom1sqrt <- glmmTMB(psite_abundance ~ event*timing*life_history + ci + (1|catalog_number) + (1|year_collected/season) + (1|fish_psite_combo) + 
                                  (1|fish_sp_x) + (total_length_mm|fish_psite_combo),
                                ziformula = ~ event*timing*life_history + ci + (1|catalog_number) + (1|year_collected/season) + (1|fish_psite_combo) + (1|fish_sp_x) +
                                  (total_length_mm|fish_psite_combo), 
                                family = nbinom1(link = "sqrt"), data = hurricane_df3)

# nbinom2 log

nbinom2log <- glmmTMB(psite_abundance ~ event*timing*life_history + ci + (1|catalog_number) + (1|year_collected/season) + (1|fish_psite_combo) + 
                                  (1|fish_sp_x) + (total_length_mm|fish_psite_combo),
                                ziformula = ~ event*timing*life_history + ci + (1|catalog_number) + (1|year_collected/season) + (1|fish_psite_combo) + (1|fish_sp_x) +
                                  (total_length_mm|fish_psite_combo), 
                                family = nbinom2, data = hurricane_df3)

# nbinom2 sqrt

nbinom2sqrt <- glmmTMB(psite_abundance ~ event*timing*life_history + ci + (1|catalog_number) + (1|year_collected/season) + (1|fish_psite_combo) + 
                                  (1|fish_sp_x) + (total_length_mm|fish_psite_combo),
                                ziformula = ~ event*timing*life_history + ci + (1|catalog_number) + (1|year_collected/season) + (1|fish_psite_combo) + (1|fish_sp_x) +
                                  (total_length_mm|fish_psite_combo), 
                                family = nbinom2(link = "sqrt"), data = hurricane_df3)

# nbinom12 log

nbinom12log <- glmmTMB(psite_abundance ~ event*timing*life_history + ci + (1|catalog_number) + (1|year_collected/season) + (1|fish_psite_combo) + 
                                  (1|fish_sp_x) + (total_length_mm|fish_psite_combo),
                                ziformula = ~ event*timing*life_history + ci + (1|catalog_number) + (1|year_collected/season) + (1|fish_psite_combo) + (1|fish_sp_x) +
                                  (total_length_mm|fish_psite_combo), 
                                family = nbinom12, data = hurricane_df3)

#nbinom12 sqrt

nbinom12sqrt <- glmmTMB(psite_abundance ~ event*timing*life_history + ci + (1|catalog_number) + (1|year_collected/season) + (1|fish_psite_combo) + 
                                  (1|fish_sp_x) + (total_length_mm|fish_psite_combo),
                                ziformula = ~ event*timing*life_history + ci + (1|catalog_number) + (1|year_collected/season) + (1|fish_psite_combo) + (1|fish_sp_x) +
                                  (total_length_mm|fish_psite_combo), 
                                family = nbinom12(link = "sqrt"), data = hurricane_df3)
## offset

# nbinom1 log

nbinom1logoff <- glmmTMB(psite_abundance ~ event*timing*life_history + ci + (1|catalog_number) + (1|year_collected/season) + (1|fish_psite_combo) + 
                                  (1|fish_sp_x) + offset(log(total_length_mm)),
                                ziformula = ~ event*timing*life_history + ci + (1|catalog_number) + (1|year_collected/season) + (1|fish_psite_combo) + (1|fish_sp_x) + 
                                  offset(sqrt(total_length_mm)), 
                                family = nbinom1, data = hurricane_df3)

# nbinom1 sqrt

nbinom1sqrtoff <- glmmTMB(psite_abundance ~ event*timing*life_history + ci + (1|catalog_number) + (1|year_collected/season) + (1|fish_psite_combo) + 
                                  (1|fish_sp_x) + offset(sqrt(total_length_mm)),
                                ziformula = ~ event*timing*life_history + ci + (1|catalog_number) + (1|year_collected/season) + (1|fish_psite_combo) + (1|fish_sp_x) + 
                                  offset(sqrt(total_length_mm)), 
                                family = nbinom1(link = "sqrt"), data = hurricane_df3)

# nbinom2 log

nbinom2logoff <- glmmTMB(psite_abundance ~ event*timing*life_history + ci + (1|catalog_number) + (1|year_collected/season) + (1|fish_psite_combo) + 
                                  (1|fish_sp_x) + offset(log(total_length_mm)),
                                ziformula = ~ event*timing*life_history + ci + (1|catalog_number) + (1|year_collected/season) + (1|fish_psite_combo) + (1|fish_sp_x) + 
                                  offset(sqrt(total_length_mm)), 
                                family = nbinom2, data = hurricane_df3)

# nbinom2 sqrt

nbinom2sqrtoff <- glmmTMB(psite_abundance ~ event*timing*life_history + ci + (1|catalog_number) + (1|year_collected/season) + (1|fish_psite_combo) + 
                                  (1|fish_sp_x) + offset(sqrt(total_length_mm)),
                                ziformula = ~ event*timing*life_history + ci + (1|catalog_number) + (1|year_collected/season) + (1|fish_psite_combo) + (1|fish_sp_x) + 
                                  offset(sqrt(total_length_mm)), 
                                family = nbinom2(link = "sqrt"), data = hurricane_df3)

# nbinom12 log

nbinom12logoff <- glmmTMB(psite_abundance ~ event*timing*life_history + ci + (1|catalog_number) + (1|year_collected/season) + (1|fish_psite_combo) + 
                                  (1|fish_sp_x) + offset(log(total_length_mm)),
                                ziformula = ~ event*timing*life_history + ci + (1|catalog_number) + (1|year_collected/season) + (1|fish_psite_combo) + (1|fish_sp_x) + 
                                  offset(sqrt(total_length_mm)), 
                                family = nbinom12, data = hurricane_df3)

#nbinom12 sqrt

nbinom12sqrtoff <- glmmTMB(psite_abundance ~ event*timing*life_history + ci + (1|catalog_number) + (1|year_collected/season) + (1|fish_psite_combo) + 
                                  (1|fish_sp_x) + offset(sqrt(total_length_mm)),
                                ziformula = ~ event*timing*life_history + ci + (1|catalog_number) + (1|year_collected/season) + (1|fish_psite_combo) + (1|fish_sp_x) + 
                                  offset(sqrt(total_length_mm)), 
                                family = nbinom12(link = "sqrt"), data = hurricane_df3)


# List of all model objects
models <- list(
  nbinom1log, nbinom1sqrt, nbinom2log, nbinom2sqrt, nbinom12log, nbinom12sqrt,
  nbinom1logoff, nbinom1sqrtoff, nbinom2logoff, nbinom2sqrtoff,
  nbinom12logoff, nbinom12sqrtoff
)

# Model names
model_names <- c(
  "nbinom1log", "nbinom1sqrt", "nbinom2log", "nbinom2sqrt", "nbinom12log", "nbinom12sqrt",
  "nbinom1logoff", "nbinom1sqrtoff", "nbinom2logoff", "nbinom2sqrtoff",
  "nbinom12logoff", "nbinom12sqrtoff"
)

# Simulate residuals and extract diagnostics
residual_summaries <- map2_df(models, model_names, function(model, name) {
  sim <- simulateResiduals(fittedModel = model, plot = FALSE)
  data.frame(
    model = name,
    dispersion = testDispersion(sim)$p.value,
    uniformity = testUniformity(sim)$p.value,
    outliers = testOutliers(sim)$p.value,
    AIC = AIC(model)
  )
})

# View and sort by AIC (lower is better) and test stats (higher p-values indicate better fit)
residual_summaries %>%
  arrange(AIC) %>%
  print()
```

# run life cycle 3 month model
```{r}
# run model 
final_h_life3 <- glmmTMB(psite_abundance ~ event*timing*life_history + ci + (1|catalog_number) + (1|year_collected/season) + (1|fish_sp_x) + (total_length_mm|fish_psite_combo),
                                ziformula = ~ event*timing*life_history + ci + (1|catalog_number) + (1|year_collected/season) + (1|fish_sp_x) + (total_length_mm|fish_psite_combo), 
                                family = nbinom2, data = hurricane_df3)

simulateResiduals(fittedModel = final_h_life3, plot = TRUE)
summary(final_h_life3)
plot(parameters(final_h_life3))

emm <- emmeans(final_h_life3, ~ event * timing * life_history)
joint_tests(final_h_life3)

emm <- emmeans(final_h_life3, ~ event * timing * life_history, type = "response")

emmip(final_h_life3, life_history ~ event | timing,
      type = "response",
      CIs = TRUE,
      dodge = 0.3) +
  theme_minimal() +
  labs(title = "Estimated Parasite Abundance by Event, Timing, and Parasite Type",
       y = "Estimated abundance (count scale)",
       x = "Event") +
  theme(legend.position = "bottom")
```
