```{r}
# Convert emmeans results to a data frame
emm_df <- as.data.frame(emm)

ggplot(emm_df, aes(x = event, y = response, color = life_history, group = life_history)) +
  geom_point(position = position_dodge(width = 0.3), size = 3) +
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin = asymp.LCL, ymax = asymp.UCL),
                position = position_dodge(width = 0.3), width = 0.2) +
  facet_wrap(~ timing) +
  theme_minimal() +
  labs(title = "Estimated Parasite Abundance by Event, Timing, and Parasite Type",
       y = "Estimated abundance (count scale)",
       x = "Event",
       color = "Parasite Type") +
  theme(legend.position = "bottom")

# post hurricane direct life cycle history are decreasing
```



# Model the effects on specific parasite species within trem_meta
```{r}
# refine the data to only include the trem_metas:
meta3 <- hurricane_df3_abundance_only_full %>% 
  filter(psite_type %in% c("trematode_metacercaria"))

meta3_reps <- meta3 %>% 
  group_by(psite_spp_x) %>% 
  summarize(observations = n(), .groups = "drop")

# remove unknown metas from the analysis (and drop meta.hs because it is being weird)
meta3 <- meta3 %>% 
  filter(!psite_spp_x %in% c("TREM.META.UNK", "META.UNK", "META.HS"))

# set most abundant meta species to be the reference level
meta3  <- meta3 %>%
  mutate(psite_spp_x = relevel(factor(psite_spp_x), ref = "TREM.META"))

# create a model that looks at species of parasite only
meta3_model <- glmmTMB(psite_abundance ~ psite_spp_x + (1|catalog_number) + (1|year_collected) + (1|season) + (1|fish_psite_combo) + (1|fish_sp_x) + (total_length_mm|fish_psite_combo),
                                family = nbinom2, data = meta3)

simulateResiduals(fittedModel = meta3_model, plot = TRUE)
summary(meta3_model)
plot(parameters(meta3_model))
# AIC is NA but maybe that doesn't really matter here?

# TREM.META.SP is significnatly increasing -- meaning this is the only meta that is definitely positively affected by hurricanes 

```

# Plot the paper's main takeaway result: 
In short, post hurricanes cause brief upward spikes in meta abundance, which taper off at 6 months, while normal post-condition abundances in metas are low consistently at 3 and 6 month intervals. Additionally, at 3 months and in hurricane conditions, metas are less abundant. 
```{r}
# plot by species of parasite

six <- ggpredict(final_h_abundance, terms = c("event", "timing", "psite_type"))
six <- six %>%
  rename(
    event = x,
    estimate = predicted,
    se = std.error,
    lower = conf.low,
    upper = conf.high,
    timing = group,
    psite_type = facet
  )
six$model <- "6 month"


three <- ggpredict(final_h_abundance3, terms = c("event", "timing", "psite_type"))

three <- three %>%
  rename(
    event = x,
    estimate = predicted,
    se = std.error,
    lower = conf.low,
    upper = conf.high,
    timing = group,
    psite_type = facet
  ) 
three$model <- "3 month"

combined_preds <- bind_rows(six, three)


#all together
full <- ggplot(combined_preds,
       aes(x = timing, y = estimate)) +
  facet_grid(event ~ model, scales = "free_y") +
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin = lower, ymax = upper, group = psite_type),
                width = 0.05,
                position = position_dodge(width = 0.5)) + 
  geom_line(aes(group = psite_type, linetype = psite_type),
            position = position_dodge(width = 0.5)) +
  geom_point(aes(fill = psite_type, group = psite_type),
             pch = 21, size = 5,
             position = position_dodge(width = 0.5)) +
  coord_cartesian(ylim = c(0, 15)) +
  scale_y_continuous(breaks = c(0, 6, 12)) +
   scale_fill_manual(
    values = c(
      "trematode_metacercaria" = "#AFDFEF", 
      "monogenean" = "#A6E000", 
      "trematode" = "#c9ad79", 
      "myxozoan" = "#07c3c5"
    ),
    labels = c(
      "trematode_metacercaria" = "trematode metacercaria",
      "monogenean" = "monogenean",
      "trematode" = "trematode adult",
      "myxozoan" = "myxozoan"
    )
  ) +
  labs(x = "Timing", y = "Estimate", fill = "Parasite Type") +
  connor_theme +
  theme(
    legend.title = element_blank()
  ) +
  guides(linetype = "none")

#meta

combined_preds_meta <- combined_preds %>% 
  filter(psite_type %in% c("trematode_metacercaria"))

meta <- ggplot(combined_preds_meta,
       aes(x = timing, y = estimate)) +
  facet_grid(event ~ model, scales = "free_y") +
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin = lower, ymax = upper, group = psite_type),
                width = 0.05,
                position = position_dodge(width = 0.5)) + 
  geom_line(aes(group = psite_type, linetype = psite_type),
            position = position_dodge(width = 0.5)) +
  geom_point(aes(fill = psite_type, group = psite_type),
             pch = 21, size = 5,
             position = position_dodge(width = 0.5)) +
  coord_cartesian(ylim = c(0, 15)) +
  scale_y_continuous(breaks = c(0, 6, 12)) +
 scale_fill_manual(
    values = c(
      "trematode_metacercaria" = "#AFDFEF", 
      "monogenean" = "#A6E000", 
      "trematode" = "#c9ad79", 
      "myxozoan" = "#07c3c5"
    ),
    labels = c(
      "trematode_metacercaria" = "trematode metacercaria",
      "monogenean" = "monogenean",
      "trematode" = "trematode adult",
      "myxozoan" = "myxozoan"
    )
  )  +
  labs(x = "Timing", y = "Estimate", fill = "Parasite Type") +
  connor_theme +
  theme(
    legend.title = element_blank()
  ) +
  guides(linetype = "none")

# trem

combined_preds_trem <- combined_preds %>% 
  filter(psite_type %in% c("trematode"))

trem <- ggplot(combined_preds_trem,
       aes(x = timing, y = estimate)) +
  facet_grid(event ~ model, scales = "free_y") +
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin = lower, ymax = upper, group = psite_type),
                width = 0.05,
                position = position_dodge(width = 0.5)) + 
  geom_line(aes(group = psite_type, linetype = psite_type),
            position = position_dodge(width = 0.5)) +
  geom_point(aes(fill = psite_type, group = psite_type),
             pch = 21, size = 5,
             position = position_dodge(width = 0.5)) +
  coord_cartesian(ylim = c(0, 15)) +
  scale_y_continuous(breaks = c(0, 6, 12)) +
  scale_fill_manual(
    values = c(
      "trematode_metacercaria" = "#AFDFEF", 
      "monogenean" = "#A6E000", 
      "trematode" = "#c9ad79", 
      "myxozoan" = "#07c3c5"
    ),
    labels = c(
      "trematode_metacercaria" = "trematode metacercaria",
      "monogenean" = "monogenean",
      "trematode" = "trematode adult",
      "myxozoan" = "myxozoan"
    )
  )  +
  labs(x = "Timing", y = "Estimate", fill = "Parasite Type") +
  connor_theme +
  theme(
    legend.title = element_blank()
  ) +
  guides(linetype = "none")

# mono

combined_preds_mono <- combined_preds %>% 
  filter(psite_type %in% c("monogenean"))

mono <- ggplot(combined_preds_mono,
       aes(x = timing, y = estimate)) +
  facet_grid(event ~ model, scales = "free_y") +
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin = lower, ymax = upper, group = psite_type),
                width = 0.05,
                position = position_dodge(width = 0.5)) + 
  geom_line(aes(group = psite_type, linetype = psite_type),
            position = position_dodge(width = 0.5)) +
  geom_point(aes(fill = psite_type, group = psite_type),
             pch = 21, size = 5,
             position = position_dodge(width = 0.5)) +
  coord_cartesian(ylim = c(0, 15)) +
  scale_y_continuous(breaks = c(0, 6, 12)) +
  scale_fill_manual(
    values = c(
      "trematode_metacercaria" = "#AFDFEF", 
      "monogenean" = "#A6E000", 
      "trematode" = "#c9ad79", 
      "myxozoan" = "#07c3c5"
    ),
    labels = c(
      "trematode_metacercaria" = "trematode metacercaria",
      "monogenean" = "monogenean",
      "trematode" = "trematode adult",
      "myxozoan" = "myxozoan"
    ))  +
  labs(x = "Timing", y = "Estimate", fill = "Parasite Type") +
  connor_theme +
  theme(
    legend.title = element_blank()
  ) +
  guides(linetype = "none")


# combine into one big plot
hurricane_final_plot <- ggarrange(full, trem, meta, mono, common.legend = TRUE, legend = "top", labels = c("A", "B", "C", "D"))
plot(hurricane_final_plot)

ggsave("hurricane_result.jpeg", width = 10, height = (9/16)*10, dpi = 300)

trem
ggsave("trem_hurricane.jpeg", width = 10, height = (9/16)*10, dpi = 300)

meta
ggsave("meta_hurricane.jpeg", width = 10, height = (9/16)*10, dpi = 300)

mono
ggsave("mono_hurricane.jpeg", width = 10, height = (9/16)*10, dpi = 300)

full
ggsave("full_hurricane.jpeg", width = 10, height = (9/16)*10, dpi = 300)

# plot life cycle results
lc6 <- ggpredict(final_h_life3, terms = c("event", "timing", "life_history"))
lc6 <- lc6 %>%
  rename(
    event = x,
    estimate = predicted,
    se = std.error,
    lower = conf.low,
    upper = conf.high,
    timing = group,
    life_cycle = facet
  )
lc6$model <- "6 month"

lc3 <- ggpredict(final_h_life3, terms = c("event", "timing", "life_history"))

lc3 <- lc3 %>%
  rename(
    event = x,
    estimate = predicted,
    se = std.error,
    lower = conf.low,
    upper = conf.high,
    timing = group,
    life_cycle = facet
  ) 
lc3$model <- "3 month"

combined_preds <- bind_rows(lc6, lc3)


#all together
ggplot(combined_preds,
       aes(x = timing, y = estimate)) +
  facet_grid(event ~ model, scales = "free_y") +
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin = lower, ymax = upper, group = life_cycle),
                width = 0.05,
                position = position_dodge(width = 0.5)) + 
  geom_line(aes(group = life_cycle, linetype = life_cycle),
            position = position_dodge(width = 0.5)) +
  geom_point(aes(fill = life_cycle, group = life_cycle),
             pch = 21, size = 5,
             position = position_dodge(width = 0.5)) +
  scale_y_continuous(breaks = c(0, 5, 10)) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("Complex" = "#6161d8", "Direct" = 	"#7cb47c"),
                    labels = c(
      "Complex" = "complex",
      "Direct" = "direct"
    )) +
  labs(x = "Timing", y = "Estimate", fill = "Parasite Type") +
  connor_theme +
  theme(
    legend.title = element_blank()	
  ) +
  guides(linetype = "none")

ggsave("life_cycles.jpeg", width = 10, height = (9/16)*10, dpi = 300)

```


# plotting model prediction outputs for both 3 and 6 month 
```{r, eval=FALSE}

params1 <- parameters(final_h_abundance) %>%
  mutate(model = "6mo")

params2 <- parameters(final_h_abundance3) %>%
  mutate(model = "3mo")

params_combined <- bind_rows(params1, params2) %>% 
  drop_na() %>%
  mutate(sig = case_when(
    CI_low > 0 ~ "Significant",
    CI_high < 0 ~ "Significant",
    TRUE ~ "n.s"
  )) %>% 
  mutate(Parameter = fct_reorder(Parameter, p, .desc = FALSE)) %>% 
  filter(!Parameter %in% c("(Intercept)")) %>% 
  group_by(model, Component) %>%
  mutate(Parameter = fct_reorder(Parameter, Coefficient, .desc = TRUE)) %>%
  ungroup()


ggplot(params_combined, 
       aes(x = Parameter, y = Coefficient, fill = model, color = model, alpha = sig)) + 
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin = CI_low, ymax = CI_high), width = 0.3,
                position = position_dodge(width = 0.6), size = 0.7) + 
  geom_point(position = position_dodge(width = 0.6), shape = 21, size = 4, stroke = 0.6) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dotted", color = "black") +
  facet_wrap(~ Component) +
  coord_flip() +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("6mo" = "#4DB6AC", "3mo" = "#FF8A65")) + 
  scale_color_manual(values = c("6mo" = "#00695C", "3mo" = "#D84315")) +
  scale_alpha_manual(values = c("Significant" = 1, "n.s" = 0.4), name = "Significance") +
  labs(title = "Model Parameter Estimates",
       y = "Coefficient Estimate ± 95% CI", x = "Parameter") +
  connor_theme


# now plot only the significant results
params_sig <- bind_rows(params1, params2) %>% 
  drop_na() %>%
  mutate(sig = case_when(
    CI_low > 0 ~ "Significant",
    CI_high < 0 ~ "Significant",
    TRUE ~ "n.s"
  )) %>% 
  mutate(Parameter = fct_reorder(Parameter, p, .desc = FALSE)) %>% 
  filter(!Parameter %in% c("(Intercept)")) %>% 
  group_by(model, Component) %>%
  mutate(Parameter = fct_reorder(Parameter, Coefficient, .desc = TRUE)) %>%
  ungroup() %>% 
  filter(p<0.08)


ggplot(params_sig, 
       aes(x = Parameter, y = Coefficient, fill = model, color = model, alpha = sig)) + 
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin = CI_low, ymax = CI_high), width = 0.3,
                position = position_dodge(width = 0.6), size = 0.7) + 
  geom_point(position = position_dodge(width = 0.6), shape = 21, size = 4, stroke = 0.6) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dotted", color = "black") +
  facet_wrap(~ Component) +
  coord_flip() +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("6mo" = "#4DB6AC", "3mo" = "#FF8A65")) + 
  scale_color_manual(values = c("6mo" = "#00695C", "3mo" = "#D84315")) +
  scale_alpha_manual(values = c("Significant" = 1, "n.s" = 0.4), name = "Significance") +
  labs(title = "p<0.08",
       y = "Estimate", x = "") +
  connor_theme

```


Plot all storms onto the season plot: 6 month
```{r}
# add facet label to seasons

ha3.season <- ha3.season %>% 
  mutate(duration = "3 months")

ha.season <- ha.season %>% 
  mutate(duration = "6 months")

timeline_df <- read.csv("~/Desktop/UW/Chapter1 NOLA/datasets/nola misc analysis - timeline dates.csv") %>% 
  janitor::clean_names() %>%
  mutate(start_date = as.Date(start_date)) %>%
  mutate(end_date = as.Date(end_date)) %>% 
  select(start_date, end_date, type, enso_event, enso_strength) %>% 
  mutate(
    start_month = month(start_date),
    start_day = day(start_date),
    end_month = month(end_date),
    end_day = day(end_date),
    rep_year = 2025,
    start_date_rep = make_date(rep_year, start_month, start_day),
    end_date_rep = make_date(rep_year, end_month, end_day)
  ) %>% 
  filter(!type %in% c("6 month", "3 month"))



p1 <- ggplot(timeline_df, 
       aes(x = start_date_rep, xend = end_date_rep, y = type, yend = type, color = type)) +
  geom_segment(size = 3, alpha = 1) +
  scale_x_date(
    limits = as.Date(c("2025-01-03", "2025-12-26")),
    date_labels = "%b",
    date_breaks = "1 month",
    expand = c(0.01, 0)
  ) + 
  scale_color_manual(values = c(
    "hurricane" = "#CB87B4",
    "tropical storm" = "#CB87B4",
    "trematode" = "#c9ad79",
    "myxozoan" = "#07c3c5"
  )) +
  labs(x = "", y = "", fill = "")  +
  connor_theme +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_blank(), axis.ticks.x = element_blank()) +
  theme(
  panel.spacing = unit(0, "pt"),
  strip.text = element_blank(), 
  legend.spacing = unit(0, "pt"),
  legend.title = element_blank()
)

p2 <- ggplot(ha.season,
       aes(x = month_day_date, y = event, fill = fish_sp_x)) +
  facet_grid(duration ~ ., switch = "x") +
  geom_violin(scale = "count", trim = FALSE) +
  geom_point(position = position_jitter(height = 0.2), shape = 21, size = 3, stroke = 0.2) +
  scale_x_date(
    limits = as.Date(c("2025-01-03", "2025-12-26")),
    date_labels = "%b",
    date_breaks = "1 month",
    expand = c(0.01, 0)
  ) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = my_pal, name = '') +
  labs(x = "", y = "", fill = "") +
  connor_theme +
  theme(
  panel.spacing = unit(0, "pt"),
  legend.spacing = unit(0, "pt"),
  axis.text.x = element_blank(),
  axis.ticks.x = element_blank()
)

season6 <- (p1 / p2 + 
  plot_layout(heights = c(1, 1.2), guides = "collect")) & 
  theme(
    axis.title.x = element_text(),
    plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5),
    legend.position = "top"
  )
 
 # 3 month
season3 <- ggplot(ha3.season,
       aes(x = month_day_date, y = event, fill = fish_sp_x)) +
  facet_grid(duration ~ ., switch = "x") +
  geom_violin(scale = "count", trim = FALSE) +
  geom_point(position = position_jitter(height = 0.2), shape = 21, size = 3, stroke = 0.2) +
  scale_x_date(
    limits = as.Date(c("2025-01-03", "2025-12-26")),
    date_labels = "%b",
    date_breaks = "1 month",
    expand = c(0.01, 0)
  ) +
 scale_fill_manual(values = my_pal, name = '') +
  labs(x = "", y = "", fill = "") +
  connor_theme +
  theme(
    panel.spacing = unit(0, "pt"),
    legend.spacing = unit(0, "pt"),
    legend.position = "none", 
    axis.title.x = element_text(),
    plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5)
  )

final_plot <- wrap_plots(season6, season3, ncol = 1, guides = "collect") + 
  plot_layout(guides = "collect") 
  

final_plot


ggsave("seasonality.jpeg", width = 10, height = (9/16)*10, dpi = 300)


# add prevalence plot of seasonality


```


# Make timelines 
Load dataframe
```{r}
# actual values
df <- read.csv("~/Desktop/UW/Chapter1 NOLA/datasets/nola misc analysis - timeline dates.csv") %>% 
  janitor::clean_names() %>%
  mutate(start_date = as.Date(start_date)) %>%
  mutate(end_date = as.Date(end_date)) %>% 
  select(start_date, end_date, type, name, category) %>% 
   mutate(
    name = factor(name,
      levels = c("control", 
                 unique(name[name != "control"][order(start_date[name != "control"])])))) %>%
  mutate(
    start_date = case_when(
      type == "pre" ~ start_date, 
      type == "post" ~ NA_Date_, 
      TRUE ~ start_date
    ),
    end_date = case_when(
      type == "pre" ~ NA_Date_,  
      type == "post" ~ end_date, 
      TRUE ~ end_date
    )
  ) %>%
  mutate(type = factor(type)) %>%
  group_by(name, type, category) %>%
  summarise(
    min_start = min(start_date, na.rm = TRUE),
    max_end = max(end_date, na.rm = TRUE)
  ) %>% 
  mutate(
    name = factor(name, levels = unique(name)),  # keep name order
    type_offset = case_when(
      type == "6 month" ~ -0.2,
      type == "3 month" ~ 0.2,
      type == "hurricane" ~ 0,
      type == "tropical storm" ~ 0  # you can adjust this if needed
    ),
    y_pos = as.numeric(name) + type_offset
  ) %>%
  mutate(earliest_start = min(min_start, na.rm = TRUE)) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  mutate(name = fct_reorder(name, earliest_start, .desc = TRUE))

# combine 3 and 6 month dfs into one

combined_hurricane_full_df <- bind_rows(
  hurricane_df_abundance_only_full %>% mutate(model = "6-month"),
  hurricane_df3_abundance_only_full %>% mutate(model = "3-month")
)


```

Make timeline.
```{r}

timeline_plot <- ggplot(df, aes(x = min_start, y = 1, color = category)) +
  geom_segment(
    data = df %>% filter(type %in% c("6 month", "3 month")),
    aes(xend = max_end, y = 1, yend = 1),
    size = 20,
    alpha = 1
  ) +
  geom_point(
    data = df %>% filter(type %in% c("hurricane", "tropical storm")),
    size = 4,
    alpha = 1, shape = 21, color = "black"
  ) +
  scale_x_date(
    breaks = seq(as.Date("1965-01-01"), as.Date("2006-01-01"), by = "5 years"),
    date_labels = "%Y"
  ) +
  scale_y_continuous(NULL, breaks = NULL) +
  scale_color_manual(values = c(
    "storm" = "#CB87B4",
    "control" = "#F4B95A"
  )) +
  labs(
    title = "",
    x = "",
    y = ""
  ) +
  connor_theme +
  theme(
    axis.text.y = element_blank(),
    axis.ticks.y = element_blank(),
    axis.text.x = element_blank(),
    axis.ticks.x = element_blank(),
    legend.position = "top",
    legend.text = element_text(size = 10)
  )


ggsave("ch_only.jpeg", width = 10, height = 3, dpi = 300)
```


# lots samples from TUBRI
Load data about TUBRI lots
```{r}
psite_data<-read.csv("~/Desktop/UW/TUBRI/data/processed/Full_dataset_with_psite_life_history_info_2024.11.21.csv") %>%
  mutate(
    Date = make_date(year = YearCollected, 
                     month = MonthCollected, 
                     day = DayCollected)
  ) %>% 
  filter(!Fish_sp.x %in% c("Percina vigil", "Carpiodes velifer"))
```

Make map of lots sampled
```{r}
bounds<-c(left=-89.855, bottom=30.69, right=-89.81, top=30.81)

mid_x <- (bounds["left"] + bounds["right"]) / 2
bottom_y <- bounds["bottom"]
top_y <- bounds["top"]
mid_y <- (bottom_y + top_y) / 2

base_map <- get_stadiamap(bounds, zoom = 12, maptype = "stamen_terrain_background")


# map with all fish sampled
ggmap(base_map) +
  geom_point(data = combined_hurricane_full_df,
             aes(x = longitude, y = latitude, fill = fish_sp_x),
             position = position_jitter(width = 0.001),
             shape = 21, size = 4, stroke = 0.5) +
   scale_x_continuous(
    limits = c(bounds["left"], bounds["right"]),
    breaks = mid_x,
    labels = round(mid_x, 4)  # Format label if needed
  ) +
 scale_y_continuous(
    limits = c(bottom_y, top_y),
    breaks = c(bottom_y, mid_y, top_y),
    labels = round(c(bottom_y, mid_y, top_y), 4)
  ) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = my_pal, name = '') +
  xlab("") +
  ylab("") + 
  connor_theme +
  theme(
    legend.position = "none",
    axis.title.x = element_text(size = 20),
    axis.title.y = element_text(size = 20),
    axis.text.x = element_text(size = 10),
    axis.text.y = element_text(size = 10)
  )

ggsave("river_plot_full.jpeg", width = 3, height = (9/16)*10, dpi = 300)

#####

species <- c("gamaff", "hybnuc", "ictpun", "notath", "pimvig")
names(my_pal) <- species

make_species_map <- function(species_name) {
  ggmap(base_map) +
    geom_point(
      data = combined_hurricane_full_df %>% filter(fish_sp_x == species_name),
      aes(x = longitude, y = latitude, fill = fish_sp_x),
      position = position_jitter(width = 0.001),
      shape = 21, size = 4, stroke = 0.5
    ) +
    scale_x_continuous(
      limits = c(bounds["left"], bounds["right"]),
      breaks = mid_x,
      labels = round(mid_x, 4)
    ) +
    scale_y_continuous(
      limits = c(bottom_y, top_y),
      breaks = c(bottom_y, mid_y, top_y),
      labels = round(c(bottom_y, mid_y, top_y), 4)
    ) +
    scale_fill_manual(values = my_pal, name = '') +
    xlab("") +
    ylab("") + 
    connor_theme +
    theme(
      axis.title.x = element_text(size = 20),
      axis.title.y = element_text(size = 20),
      axis.text.x = element_text(size = 10),
      axis.text.y = element_text(size = 10)
    )
}

# Create plots
a <- make_species_map("pimvig")
b <- make_species_map("hybnuc") + 
  theme(
    axis.title.y = element_blank(), 
    axis.text.y = element_blank() 
  )
c <- make_species_map("notath") + 
  theme(
    axis.title.y = element_blank(), 
    axis.text.y = element_blank() 
  )
d <- make_species_map("gamaff") + 
  theme(
    axis.title.y = element_blank(), 
    axis.text.y = element_blank() 
  )
e <- make_species_map("ictpun") + 
  theme(
    axis.title.y = element_blank(), 
    axis.text.y = element_blank() 
  )

# Combine with patchwork
final_plot <- (a | b | c | d | e) +
  plot_layout(guides = "collect") &
  theme(legend.position = "top")

final_plot


ggsave("river_plot.jpeg", width = 10, height = (9/16)*10, dpi = 300)

```

Make fish replication plot
```{r}

fish <- ggplot(data = combined_hurricane_full_df, aes(x = date, y = fish_sp_x)) +
  geom_point(data = combined_hurricane_full_df, aes(x = date, fill = fish_sp_x),
             position = position_jitter(width = 0.15), shape = 21, size = 3) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = my_pal, name = '') +
  xlab("") +
  ylab("") +
  scale_x_continuous(
    breaks = seq(1965, 2006, by = 5),
    labels = as.character(seq(1965, 2006, by = 5))
  ) +
  connor_theme + 
  theme(
    axis.text.y = element_blank(),
    axis.ticks.y = element_blank(),
    legend.position = "bottom",
    legend.text = element_text(size = 10)
  )


```
Make final plot
```{r}

x_scale_shared <- scale_x_date(
  limits = as.Date(c("1965-01-01", "2006-01-01")),
  breaks = seq(as.Date("1965-01-01"), as.Date("2006-01-01"), by = "5 years"),
  date_labels = "%Y"
)

timeline_plot <- timeline_plot + x_scale_shared
fish <- fish + x_scale_shared

final_timeline <- wrap_plots(timeline_plot, fish, ncol = 1)
final_timeline

ggsave("timeline.jpeg", width = 10, height = (9/16)*10, dpi = 300)
```

Merge output tables for models
```{r}
# season abundance
s6 <- tbl_regression(season_model6, exponentiate = TRUE)
s3 <- tbl_regression(season_model3, exponentiate = TRUE) 

season_table <- tbl_merge(
    tbls = list(s3, s6),
    tab_spanner = c("**3 month**", "**6 month**")
  ) %>% 
   modify_caption("**Seasonality on Parasite Abundance**")

s_table <- as_gt(season_table)
gtsave(s_table, filename = "season_table.png", expand = 10, vwidth = 1000, vheight = (9/16)*1000, zoom = 2)


# season prevalence
s6p <- tbl_regression(season_model6p, exponentiate = TRUE)
s3p <- tbl_regression(season_model3p, exponentiate = TRUE) 

season_tablep <- tbl_merge(
    tbls = list(s3p, s6p),
    tab_spanner = c("**3 month**", "**6 month**")
  ) %>% 
   modify_caption("**Seasonality on Parasite Prevalence**")

s_tablep <- as_gt(season_tablep)
gtsave(s_tablep, filename = "season_table.png", expand = 10, vwidth = 1000, vheight = (9/16)*1000, zoom = 2)

# abundance conditional
h6a <- tbl_regression(
  final_h_abundance,
  exponentiate = TRUE,
  tidy_fun = function(x, ...) broom.mixed::tidy(x, component = "cond", effects = "fixed", ...)
)
h3a <- tbl_regression(
  final_h_abundance3,
  exponentiate = TRUE,
  tidy_fun = function(x, ...) broom.mixed::tidy(x, component = "cond", effects = "fixed", ...)
)

a_table <- tbl_merge(
    tbls = list(h3a, h6a),
    tab_spanner = c("**3 month**", "**6 month**")
  ) %>% 
   modify_caption("**Parasite Abundance (conditional)**")

abun_table <- as_gt(a_table)
gtsave(abun_table, filename = "abun_cond_tbl.png", expand = 10, vwidth = 1000, vheight = (9/16)*1000, zoom = 2)

# abundance zi
h6a_z <- tbl_regression(
  final_h_abundance,
  exponentiate = TRUE,
  tidy_fun = function(x, ...) broom.mixed::tidy(x, component = "zi", effects = "fixed", ...)
)
h3a_z <- tbl_regression(
  final_h_abundance3,
  exponentiate = TRUE,
  tidy_fun = function(x, ...) broom.mixed::tidy(x, component = "zi", effects = "fixed", ...)
)

az_table <- tbl_merge(
    tbls = list(h3a_z, h6a_z),
    tab_spanner = c("**3 month**", "**6 month**")
  ) %>% 
   modify_caption("**Parasite Abundance (zero-inflated)**")

abun_table_z <- as_gt(az_table)
gtsave(abun_table_z, filename = "abun_zi_tbl.png", expand = 10, vwidth = 1000, vheight = (9/16)*1000, zoom = 2)

# prevalence conditional
h6p <- tbl_regression(
  hurricane_prevalence_final,
  exponentiate = TRUE,
  tidy_fun = function(x, ...) broom.mixed::tidy(x, component = "cond", effects = "fixed", ...)
)
h3p <- tbl_regression(
  hurricane_prevalence3_final,
  exponentiate = TRUE,
  tidy_fun = function(x, ...) broom.mixed::tidy(x, component = "cond", effects = "fixed", ...)
)

p_table <- tbl_merge(
    tbls = list(h3p, h6p),
    tab_spanner = c("**3 month**", "**6 month**")
  ) %>% 
   modify_caption("**Parasite Prevalence (conditional)**")

prev_table <- as_gt(p_table)
gtsave(prev_table, filename = "prev_cond_tbl.png", expand = 10, vwidth = 1000, vheight = (9/16)*1000, zoom = 2)

# prevalence zi
h6p_z <- tbl_regression(
  hurricane_prevalence_final,
  exponentiate = TRUE,
  tidy_fun = function(x, ...) broom.mixed::tidy(x, component = "zi", effects = "fixed", ...)
)
h3p_z <- tbl_regression(
  hurricane_prevalence3_final,
  exponentiate = TRUE,
  tidy_fun = function(x, ...) broom.mixed::tidy(x, component = "zi", effects = "fixed", ...)
)

pz_table <- tbl_merge(
    tbls = list(h3p_z, h6p_z),
    tab_spanner = c("**3 month**", "**6 month**")
  ) %>% 
   modify_caption("**Parasite Prevalence (zero-inflated)**")

prev_table_z <- as_gt(pz_table)
gtsave(prev_table_z, filename = "prev_zi_tbl.png", expand = 10, vwidth = 1000, vheight = (9/16)*1000, zoom = 2)


# monogene abundance
# abundance conditional
h6am <- tbl_regression(
  final_h_abundancemono,
  exponentiate = TRUE,
  tidy_fun = function(x, ...) broom.mixed::tidy(x, component = "cond", effects = "fixed", ...)
)
h3am <- tbl_regression(
  final_h_abundance3mono,
  exponentiate = TRUE,
  tidy_fun = function(x, ...) broom.mixed::tidy(x, component = "cond", effects = "fixed", ...)
)

am_table <- tbl_merge(
    tbls = list(h3am, h6am),
    tab_spanner = c("**3 month**", "**6 month**")
  ) %>% 
   modify_caption("**Parasite Abundance (conditional) [meta as reference]**")

abun_tablem <- as_gt(am_table)
gtsave(abun_tablem, filename = "abun_mono_cond_tbl.png", expand = 10, vwidth = 1000, vheight = (9/16)*1000, zoom = 2)

# abundance zi
h6a_zm <- tbl_regression(
  final_h_abundancemono,
  exponentiate = TRUE,
  tidy_fun = function(x, ...) broom.mixed::tidy(x, component = "zi", effects = "fixed", ...)
)
h3a_zm <- tbl_regression(
  final_h_abundance3mono,
  exponentiate = TRUE,
  tidy_fun = function(x, ...) broom.mixed::tidy(x, component = "zi", effects = "fixed", ...)
)

az_tablem <- tbl_merge(
    tbls = list(h3a_z, h6a_z),
    tab_spanner = c("**3 month**", "**6 month**")
  ) %>% 
   modify_caption("**Parasite Abundance (zero-inflated) [meta as reference]**")

abun_table_zm <- as_gt(az_tablem)
gtsave(abun_table_zm, filename = "abun_mono_zi_tbl.png", expand = 10, vwidth = 1000, vheight = (9/16)*1000, zoom = 2)

```

Total fish dissected for this analysis:
```{r}
fish_done <- combined_hurricane_full_df %>% 
  summarise(unique_catalogs = n_distinct(individual_fish_id))
```

# Life cycle effects
check to see if the type of life cycle a parasite has (direct or complex) has an effect on parasite abundance
```{r}
# make tables of model outputs
# season life cycle
lcs6t <- tbl_regression(season_model6.lc, exponentiate = TRUE)
lcs3t <- tbl_regression(season_model3.lc, exponentiate = TRUE) 

lcs_table <- tbl_merge(
    tbls = list(lcs3t, lcs6t),
    tab_spanner = c("**3 month**", "**6 month**")
  ) %>% 
   modify_caption("**Seasonality on Life Cycle**")

lcs_table <- as_gt(lcs_table)
gtsave(lcs_table, filename = "life_cycle_table.png", expand = 10, vwidth = 1000, vheight = (9/16)*1000, zoom = 2)

# models life cycle conditional
lc6t <- tbl_regression(final_h_life6, exponentiate = TRUE)
lc3t <- tbl_regression(final_h_life3, exponentiate = TRUE) 

lc_table <- tbl_merge(
    tbls = list(lc3t, lc6t),
    tab_spanner = c("**3 month**", "**6 month**")
  ) %>% 
   modify_caption("**Hurricane Effects on Life Cycle**")

lc_table <- as_gt(lc_table)
gtsave(lc_table, filename = "life_cycle_model_table.png", expand = 10, vwidth = 1000, vheight = (9/16)*1000, zoom = 2)

# life cycle conditional
h6alc <- tbl_regression(
  final_h_life6,
  exponentiate = TRUE,
  tidy_fun = function(x, ...) broom.mixed::tidy(x, component = "cond", effects = "fixed", ...)
)
h3alc <- tbl_regression(
  final_h_life3,
  exponentiate = TRUE,
  tidy_fun = function(x, ...) broom.mixed::tidy(x, component = "cond", effects = "fixed", ...)
)

alc_table <- tbl_merge(
    tbls = list(h3alc, h6alc),
    tab_spanner = c("**3 month**", "**6 month**")
  ) %>% 
   modify_caption("**Parasite Life Cycle (conditional)**")

abun_table_lc <- as_gt(alc_table)
gtsave(abun_table_lc, filename = "abun_lc_cond_tbl.png", expand = 10, vwidth = 1000, vheight = (9/16)*1000, zoom = 2)

# abundance zi
h6zilc <- tbl_regression(
  final_h_life6,
  exponentiate = TRUE,
  tidy_fun = function(x, ...) broom.mixed::tidy(x, component = "zi", effects = "fixed", ...)
)
h3zilc <- tbl_regression(
  final_h_life3,
  exponentiate = TRUE,
  tidy_fun = function(x, ...) broom.mixed::tidy(x, component = "zi", effects = "fixed", ...)
)

zilc_table <- tbl_merge(
    tbls = list(h3zilc, h6zilc),
    tab_spanner = c("**3 month**", "**6 month**")
  ) %>% 
   modify_caption("**Parasite Life Cycle (zero-inflated)**")

zi_table_lc <- as_gt(zilc_table)
gtsave(zi_table_lc, filename = "zi_lc_cond_tbl.png", expand = 10, vwidth = 1000, vheight = (9/16)*1000, zoom = 2)
```

# Life cycle plot for seasonality
```{r}
## plot seasonality for the total samples taken and used in the life cycle analyses
ha.season.lc3 <- ha.season.lc3 %>% 
  mutate(duration = "3 months")

ha.season.lc <- ha.season.lc %>% 
  mutate(duration = "6 months")

timeline_df <- read.csv("~/Desktop/UW/Chapter1 NOLA/datasets/nola misc analysis - timeline dates.csv") %>% 
  janitor::clean_names() %>%
  mutate(start_date = as.Date(start_date)) %>%
  mutate(end_date = as.Date(end_date)) %>% 
  select(start_date, end_date, type, enso_event, enso_strength) %>% 
  mutate(
    start_month = month(start_date),
    start_day = day(start_date),
    end_month = month(end_date),
    end_day = day(end_date),
    rep_year = 2025,
    start_date_rep = make_date(rep_year, start_month, start_day),
    end_date_rep = make_date(rep_year, end_month, end_day)
  ) %>% 
  filter(!type %in% c("6 month", "3 month"))



p1 <- ggplot(timeline_df, 
       aes(x = start_date_rep, xend = end_date_rep, y = type, yend = type, color = type)) +
  geom_segment(size = 3, alpha = 1) +
  scale_x_date(
    limits = as.Date(c("2025-01-03", "2025-12-26")),
    date_labels = "%b",
    date_breaks = "1 month",
    expand = c(0.01, 0)
  ) + 
  scale_color_manual(values = c(
    "hurricane" = "#CB87B4",
    "tropical storm" = "#CB87B4",
    "trematode" = "#c9ad79",
    "myxozoan" = "#07c3c5"
  )) +
  labs(x = "", y = "", fill = "")  +
  connor_theme +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_blank(), axis.ticks.x = element_blank()) +
  theme(
  panel.spacing = unit(0, "pt"),
  strip.text = element_blank(), 
  legend.spacing = unit(0, "pt"),
  legend.title = element_blank()
)

p2 <- ggplot(ha.season.lc,
       aes(x = month_day_date, y = event, fill = fish_sp_x)) +
  facet_grid(duration ~ ., switch = "x") +
  geom_violin(scale = "count", trim = FALSE) +
  geom_point(position = position_jitter(height = 0.2), shape = 21, size = 3, stroke = 0.2) +
  scale_x_date(
    limits = as.Date(c("2025-01-03", "2025-12-26")),
    date_labels = "%b",
    date_breaks = "1 month",
    expand = c(0.01, 0)
  ) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = my_pal, name = '') +
  labs(x = "", y = "", fill = "") +
  connor_theme +
  theme(
  panel.spacing = unit(0, "pt"),
  legend.spacing = unit(0, "pt"),
  axis.text.x = element_blank(),
  axis.ticks.x = element_blank()
)

season6 <- (p1 / p2 + 
  plot_layout(heights = c(1, 1.2), guides = "collect")) & 
  theme(
    axis.title.x = element_text(),
    plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5),
    legend.position = "top"
  )
 
 # 3 month
season3 <- ggplot(ha.season.lc3,
       aes(x = month_day_date, y = event, fill = fish_sp_x)) +
  facet_grid(duration ~ ., switch = "x") +
  geom_violin(scale = "count", trim = FALSE) +
  geom_point(position = position_jitter(height = 0.2), shape = 21, size = 3, stroke = 0.2) +
  scale_x_date(
    limits = as.Date(c("2025-01-03", "2025-12-26")),
    date_labels = "%b",
    date_breaks = "1 month",
    expand = c(0.01, 0)
  ) +
 scale_fill_manual(values = my_pal, name = '') +
  labs(x = "", y = "", fill = "") +
  connor_theme +
  theme(
    panel.spacing = unit(0, "pt"),
    legend.spacing = unit(0, "pt"),
    legend.position = "none", 
    axis.title.x = element_text(),
    plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5)
  )

final_plot <- wrap_plots(season6, season3, ncol = 1, guides = "collect") + 
  plot_layout(guides = "collect") 
  

final_plot


ggsave("seasonality_lc.jpeg", width = 10, height = (9/16)*10, dpi = 300)

```

# Make prevalence seasonality plot
```{r}
## ALL THIS NEEDS TO BE CHANGED TO PREVALENCE 

## plot seasonality for the total samples taken and used in the life cycle analyses
ha.season.p3 <- hp3.season %>%  
  mutate(duration = "3 months")

ha.season.p <- hp.season %>% 
  mutate(duration = "6 months")

timeline_df <- read.csv("~/Desktop/UW/Chapter1 NOLA/datasets/nola misc analysis - timeline dates.csv") %>% 
  janitor::clean_names() %>%
  mutate(start_date = as.Date(start_date)) %>%
  mutate(end_date = as.Date(end_date)) %>% 
  select(start_date, end_date, type, enso_event, enso_strength) %>% 
  mutate(
    start_month = month(start_date),
    start_day = day(start_date),
    end_month = month(end_date),
    end_day = day(end_date),
    rep_year = 2025,
    start_date_rep = make_date(rep_year, start_month, start_day),
    end_date_rep = make_date(rep_year, end_month, end_day)
  ) %>% 
  filter(!type %in% c("6 month", "3 month"))



p1 <- ggplot(timeline_df, 
       aes(x = start_date_rep, xend = end_date_rep, y = type, yend = type, color = type)) +
  geom_segment(size = 3, alpha = 1) +
  scale_x_date(
    limits = as.Date(c("2025-01-03", "2025-12-26")),
    date_labels = "%b",
    date_breaks = "1 month",
    expand = c(0.01, 0)
  ) + 
  scale_color_manual(values = c(
    "hurricane" = "#CB87B4",
    "tropical storm" = "#CB87B4",
    "trematode" = "#c9ad79",
    "myxozoan" = "#07c3c5"
  )) +
  labs(x = "", y = "", fill = "")  +
  connor_theme +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_blank(), axis.ticks.x = element_blank()) +
  theme(
  panel.spacing = unit(0, "pt"),
  strip.text = element_blank(), 
  legend.spacing = unit(0, "pt"),
  legend.title = element_blank()
)

p2 <- ggplot(ha.season.p,
       aes(x = month_day_date, y = event, fill = fish_sp_x)) +
  facet_grid(duration ~ ., switch = "x") +
  geom_violin(scale = "count", trim = FALSE) +
  geom_point(position = position_jitter(height = 0.2), shape = 21, size = 3, stroke = 0.2) +
  scale_x_date(
    limits = as.Date(c("2025-01-03", "2025-12-26")),
    date_labels = "%b",
    date_breaks = "1 month",
    expand = c(0.01, 0)
  ) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = my_pal, name = '') +
  labs(x = "", y = "", fill = "") +
  connor_theme +
  theme(
  panel.spacing = unit(0, "pt"),
  legend.spacing = unit(0, "pt"),
  axis.text.x = element_blank(),
  axis.ticks.x = element_blank()
)

season6 <- (p1 / p2 + 
  plot_layout(heights = c(1, 1.2), guides = "collect")) & 
  theme(
    axis.title.x = element_text(),
    plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5),
    legend.position = "top"
  )
 
 # 3 month
season3 <- ggplot(ha.season.p3,
       aes(x = month_day_date, y = event, fill = fish_sp_x)) +
  facet_grid(duration ~ ., switch = "x") +
  geom_violin(scale = "count", trim = FALSE) +
  geom_point(position = position_jitter(height = 0.2), shape = 21, size = 3, stroke = 0.2) +
  scale_x_date(
    limits = as.Date(c("2025-01-03", "2025-12-26")),
    date_labels = "%b",
    date_breaks = "1 month",
    expand = c(0.01, 0)
  ) +
 scale_fill_manual(values = my_pal, name = '') +
  labs(x = "", y = "", fill = "") +
  connor_theme +
  theme(
    panel.spacing = unit(0, "pt"),
    legend.spacing = unit(0, "pt"),
    legend.position = "none", 
    axis.title.x = element_text(),
    plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5)
  )

final_plot <- wrap_plots(season6, season3, ncol = 1, guides = "collect") + 
  plot_layout(guides = "collect") 
  

final_plot


ggsave("seasonality_prev.jpeg", width = 10, height = (9/16)*10, dpi = 300)
```


# Group things to see what is complex vs direct:
```{r}
lc.bins <- hurricane_df6 %>% 
  group_by(psite_type, life_history, fish_sp_x) %>% 
  summarize(avg.bin = n())

lc.bins2 <- hurricane_df3 %>% 
  group_by(psite_type, life_history, fish_sp_x) %>% 
  summarize(avg.bin = n())

testing <- hurricane_df3_prevalence %>% 
  group_by(fish_sp_x) %>% 
  summarize(avg.bin = n())

lc.bins2 <- hurricane_df3 %>% 
  group_by(psite_type, life_history) %>% 
  summarize(avg.bin = n())
```


# Adding ENSO data
```{r, eval=FALSE}


# add el nino / la nina information from https://ggweather.com/enso/oni.htm
el_nino_df <- data.frame(
  year = c(
    1952, 1953, 1957, 1958, 1982, 1983,
    1963, 1964, 1965, 1966, 1997, 1998,
    1958, 1959, 1968, 1969, 1972, 1973, 2015, 2016,
    1969, 1970, 1986, 1987, 1987, 1988,
    1976, 1977, 1994, 1995, 1991, 1992,
    1977, 1978, 2002, 2003, 2023, 2024,
    1979, 1980, 2009, 2010,
    2004, 2005,
    2006, 2007,
    2014, 2015,
    2018, 2019
  ))

la_nina_df <- data.frame(
  year = c(
    1951, 1952, 1954, 1955, 1955, 1956,
    1973, 1974, 1953, 1954, 1964, 1965,
    1970, 1971, 1975, 1976, 1971, 1972,
    1995, 1996, 1988, 1989, 1974, 1975,
    2011, 2012, 1998, 1999, 1983, 1984,
    2020, 2021, 1999, 2000, 1984, 1985,
    2021, 2022, 2007, 2008, 2000, 2001,
    2010, 2011, 2005, 2006, 2008, 2009,
    2016, 2017, 2017, 2018, 2022, 2023
  ))

el_nino_df <- el_nino_df %>% 
  mutate(year = as.integer(year)) %>%
  mutate(phase = "El Nino") %>% 
  mutate(phase = as.factor(phase))

la_nina_df <- la_nina_df %>% 
  mutate(year = as.integer(year)) %>%
  mutate(phase = "La Nina") %>% 
  mutate(phase = as.factor(phase))

combined_enso <- bind_rows(el_nino_df, la_nina_df)

phase_counts <- combined_enso %>%
  distinct(year, phase) %>%
  count(year) %>%
  filter(n > 1) %>%
  pull(year)

# 4. Assign 'Hybrid' label for those years
enso_labeled <- combined_enso %>%
  mutate(phase = ifelse(year %in% phase_counts, "Hybrid", phase)) %>%
  distinct(year, .keep_all = TRUE)

full_data <- full_data %>%
  left_join(enso_df, by = "year_collected")
```




# Estimating Biodiversity Changes
Jackknife estimates - all parasites
```{r}
# create DF for biodiversity estimates -- drop species that have very low replication, so kick out all cilliate, nematomorph, leech, copepod observations (but lets keep in nematodes, cestodes, and acanths)
# Remove unwanted parasite types and drop their factor levels
biodiv_df <- hurricane_df6 %>% 
  filter(!psite_type %in% c("nematomorph", "ciliate", "leech", "copepod")) %>% 
  droplevels()

# Get all unique combinations of grouping variables
group_combos <- unique(biodiv_df[, c("event", "timing", "ci", "psite_type", "fish_sp_x",  "psite_spp_y")])

# Empty results data frame
jackknife_results <- data.frame(
  event = character(),
  timing = character(),
  ci = character(),
  psite_type = character(),
  fish_sp_x = character(),
  psite_spp_y = character(),
  jackknife_mean_richness = numeric(),
  total_psite_count = numeric(),
  stringsAsFactors = FALSE
)

# Loop over each combination
for (i in 1:nrow(group_combos)) {
  event <- group_combos$event[i]
  timing <- group_combos$timing[i]
  ci <- group_combos$ci[i]
  psite <- group_combos$psite_type[i]
  fish <- group_combos$fish_sp_x[i]
  rich <- group_combos$psite_spp_y[i]
  
  # Safe subsetting using which()
  sub_df <- biodiv_df[which(
    biodiv_df$event == event &
    biodiv_df$timing == timing &
    biodiv_df$ci == ci &
    biodiv_df$psite_type == psite &
    biodiv_df$fish_sp_x == fish &
    biodiv_df$psite_spp_y == rich
  ), ]
  
  # Remove 0-counts
  sub_df <- sub_df[sub_df$psite_count != 0, ]
  
  # Skip if no data
  if (nrow(sub_df) == 0) next
  
  # Unique samples
  sample_ids <- unique(sub_df$x)
  richness_values <- numeric(length(sample_ids))
  
  for (j in seq_along(sample_ids)) {
    id_to_leave_out <- sample_ids[j]
    df_minus_one <- sub_df[sub_df$x != id_to_leave_out, ]
    richness_values[j] <- length(unique(df_minus_one$psite_spp_x))
  }
  
  total_count <- sum(sub_df$psite_count, na.rm = TRUE)
  
  jackknife_results <- rbind(jackknife_results, data.frame(
    event = event,
    timing = timing,
    ci = ci,
    psite_type = as.character(psite), 
    fish_sp_x = as.character(fish),
    psite_spp_y = as.character(rich),
    jackknife_mean_richness = mean(richness_values),
    total_psite_count = total_count
  ))
}

# Remove incomplete rows
jackknife_results <- jackknife_results[complete.cases(jackknife_results), ]


# create plots for the variety of combinations of factors we want to investigate

# event
ggplot(jackknife_results,
       aes(x = psite_type, y = jackknife_mean_richness, fill = psite_type)) +
  geom_col(position = "dodge") +
  facet_wrap(timing ~ event) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 12) +
  labs(
    x = "Fish species",
    y = "Mean Parasite Richness (Jackknife)",
    fill = "Parasite type"
  ) + connor_theme
```




## Plot jacknife estimates
```{r}
ggplot(jackknife_results,
       aes(x = psite_type, y = jackknife_mean_richness, fill = psite_spp_y)) +
  geom_col(position = "dodge") +
  facet_wrap(timing ~ event) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 12) +
  labs(
    x = "Fish species",
    y = "Mean Parasite Richness (Jackknife)",
    fill = "Parasite type"
  ) + connor_theme 

# trim df to be one df for each type of parasite
acanths <- jackknife_results %>% 
  filter(psite_type %in% c("acanthocephalan")) %>% 
  droplevels()

jk_a <- ggplot(jackknife_results,
       aes(x = timing, y = jackknife_mean_richness, fill = psite_spp_y)) +
  geom_col(position = "dodge") +
  facet_wrap(~ event) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 12) +
  labs(
    x = "Fish species",
    y = "Mean Parasite Richness (Jackknife)",
    fill = "Parasite type"
  ) + connor_theme + guides(fill = "none")


nems <- jackknife_results %>% 
  filter(psite_type %in% c("nematode")) %>% 
  droplevels()

jk_n <- ggplot(nems,
       aes(x = timing, y = jackknife_mean_richness, fill = psite_spp_y)) +
  geom_col(position = "dodge") +
  facet_wrap(~ event) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 12) +
  labs(
    x = "Fish species",
    y = "Mean Parasite Richness (Jackknife)",
    fill = "Parasite type"
  ) + connor_theme + guides(fill = "none")

cest <- jackknife_results %>% 
  filter(psite_type %in% c("cestode")) %>% 
  droplevels()

jk_c <- ggplot(cest,
       aes(x = timing, y = jackknife_mean_richness, fill = psite_spp_y)) +
  geom_col(position = "dodge") +
  facet_wrap(~ event) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 12) +
  labs(
    x = "Fish species",
    y = "Mean Parasite Richness (Jackknife)",
    fill = "Parasite type"
  ) + connor_theme + guides(fill = "none")

trem <- jackknife_results %>% 
  filter(psite_type %in% c("trematode")) %>% 
  droplevels() 

jk_t <- ggplot(trem,
       aes(x = timing, y = jackknife_mean_richness, fill = psite_spp_y)) +
  geom_col(position = "dodge") +
  facet_wrap(~ event) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 12) +
  labs(
    x = "Fish species",
    y = "Mean Parasite Richness (Jackknife)",
    fill = "Parasite type"
  ) + connor_theme + guides(fill = "none")

trem_meta <- jackknife_results %>% 
  filter(psite_type %in% c("trematode_metacercaria")) %>% 
  droplevels()

jk_tm <- ggplot(trem_meta,
       aes(x = timing, y = jackknife_mean_richness, fill = psite_spp_y)) +
  geom_col(position = "dodge") +
  facet_wrap(~ event) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 12) +
  labs(
    x = "Fish species",
    y = "Mean Parasite Richness (Jackknife)",
    fill = "Parasite type"
  ) + connor_theme + guides(fill = "none")

mono <- jackknife_results %>% 
  filter(psite_type %in% c("monogenean")) %>% 
  droplevels()

jk_mono <- ggplot(mono,
       aes(x = timing, y = jackknife_mean_richness, fill = psite_spp_y)) +
  geom_col(position = "dodge") +
  facet_wrap(~ event) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 12) +
  labs(
    x = "Fish species",
    y = "Mean Parasite Richness (Jackknife)",
    fill = "Parasite type"
  ) + connor_theme + guides(fill = "none")

myxo <- jackknife_results %>% 
  filter(psite_type %in% c("myxozoan")) %>% 
  droplevels()

jk_myxo <- ggplot(myxo,
       aes(x = timing, y = jackknife_mean_richness, fill = psite_spp_y)) +
  geom_col(position = "dodge") +
  facet_wrap(~ event) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 12) +
  labs(
    x = "Fish species",
    y = "Mean Parasite Richness (Jackknife)",
    fill = "Parasite type"
  ) + connor_theme + guides(fill = "none")

# combine all plots into one
biodiv_plot_hurricane <- ggarrange(jk_a, jk_n, jk_c, jk_t, jk_tm, jk_mono, jk_myxo, common.legend = FALSE, legend = "bottom", labels = c("A", "B", "C", "D", "E", "F", "G"))
plot(biodiv_plot_hurricane)

```


kcal ~ status*time + xyz

status:
control
lactation
pregnant


time (as factor): 
for controls, randomly assigned to all control periods 
months convert to - 0-3, 4-6, 7-9, 10-12, 13-15, 15-18

182.5 controls per category
